1000620669.english: I've been the only one doing constant reconnaissance lately, but ground troops do temporary reconnaissance too, not just me. How can you suspect only me?
1000620669.korean: 상시 정찰은 요즘 나만 했지만 임시 정찰은 나 뿐 아니라 지상 병력들도 하잖아.&n어떻게 나만 의심할 수 있어?

1000620670.english: That's right! Master, Leah wouldn't do anything that would put her friend in danger!
1000620670.korean: 맞아요! 주인님, 레아는 친구가 위험해질 일을 하지 않아요!

1000620671.english: The two bioroids immediately plead their innocence. If I give the order now, the truth will be easily revealed... but the aftermath won't be good.
1000620671.korean: - 두 바이오로이드는 바로 억울함을 호소한다. 여기서 명령을 하면 진실이 쉽게 밝혀지겠지만…&n그 뒤가 좋진 않겠지.

1000620672.english: Then you have to ask carefully.

1000620673.english: Of course! I have a flower called me! I don't need any other flower!
1000620673.korean: 당연하지! 나라는 꽃이 있는데! 다른 꽃은 필요 없어!

1000620674.english: Of course… it’s true that I’m Hachiko’s friend, but…

1000620675.english: Ugh... She's always been the type to cling to anyone. She's always liked kids who are always on the go...
1000620675.korean: 칫… 걔 원래 아무에게나 잘 엉겨붙잖아. 옛날부터 날아다니는 애들을 좋아하기도 했고...

1000620676.english: She kept saying she wanted to try flying too, so I just took her along on a few reconnaissance flights.
1000620676.korean: 하도 자기도 날아보고 싶다고 해서 몇 번 정찰 비행에 안고 가준 것 뿐이야.

1000620677.english: Well, it’s not like my speed will slow down just because I’m holding a bare-handed Hachiko.
1000620677.korean: 뭐, 내가 맨몸의 하치코 하나 들었다고 속도가 느려질 리도 없으니까.

1000620678.english: Anyway, I have been taking her along on scouting missions lately. Whenever she had time. I heard she called me her friend?
1000620678.korean: 어쨌든 요즘엔 정찰에 좀 데리고 다니긴 했어. 걔가 시간 날 때마다. 그러니까 나보고 친구라던데?

1000620679.english: Ugh! Hachiko has another friend besides me…

1000620680.english: She has a lot of friends. She doesn't get angry suddenly like you do. Even the kids in Orca who have no friends because of their bad tempers would probably call Hachiko their friend.
1000620680.korean: 걔 친구 많아. 그쪽처럼 갑자기 화를 내질 않아서. 심지어 오르카에서 성격 나빠서 친구 없는 애들도&n다 하치코는 친구라고 할걸?

1000620681.korean: 제, 제가 언제 갑자기 화를 냈다고…

1000620682.english: Well, if you don't understand, I'll explain it to you in detail. Why? Do you want me to tell you right here? In front of the Commander?
1000620682.korean: 뭐, 모르겠으면 내가 구구절절이 이야기해주고. 왜? 이 자리에서 해줘? 사령관 있는 자리에서?

1000620684.english: I don't really have a preference for flowers either... I guess I just prefer crops.
1000620684.korean: 저도 딱히 꽃에 대해서는… 전 아무래도 농작물을 더 좋아하니까요.

1000620685.english: Besides, there is no way I would tell a story where Hachiko gets into danger. Going on a solo sortie...
1000620685.korean: 게다가 제가 하치코가 위험해 지는 이야기를 할 리도 없잖아요. 혼자 출격이라니...

1000620686.english: Master, you are being too harsh.

1000620687.english: Did I get it wrong? Leah is even shedding tears.
1000620687.korean: - 아무래도 잘못 짚은 건가? 레아는 눈물까지 보인다.

1000620688.english: No, Master, you did that because you were worried about my friend, so... even though I feel a bit wronged, I'll cooperate for now.
1000620688.korean: 아니에요. 주인님도 제 친구를 걱정해서 그렇게 하신 거니… 조금 억울하긴 하지만 일단은&n저도 협조하기로 할게요.

1000620689.english: So, you're saying it's the friend who treated you to the food? I think we should focus on that aspect.
1000620689.korean: 그러니까 그 음식을 대접한 친구란 거죠? 거기를 중점적으로 생각해 봐야 할 것 같은데요?

1000620690.english: I had set food aside because I didn't think it would be much of a clue... but there are so many people learning to cook from Sowon these days.
1000620690.korean: - 음식은 딱히 단서가 되지 않을 것 같아서 제쳐둔 것이었는데… 요즘 소완에게 요리를 배우는&n인원이 워낙 많으니까.

1000620691.english: Sweet and savory… soft… Hmm? Suddenly, a memory comes to mind.
1000620691.korean: - 달콤 고소… 부드러운… 음? 갑자기 무언가 기억이 떠오른다.

1000620693.english: It seems like Leah and I thought of the same bioroid at the same time.
1000620693.korean: - 나와 레아가 동시에 같은 바이오로이드를 떠올린 것 같다.

1000620694.english: Recently, the elf said that she is making her own special cheese... and that she uses very special ingredients.
1000620694.korean: 최근에 엘프가 자기만의 특제 치즈를 만든다고… 아주 특별한 재료를 쓴다고 했거든요.

1000620695.english: What? Looks like you found the culprit?

1000620696.english: For now, I'm off. She's usually someone who wanders around a lot, but I'm a bit worried since she's gone missing.
1000620696.korean: 일단, 난 가볼게. 원래 여기저기 잘 돌아다니는 애지만 없어졌다니 걱정은 좀 되네.

1000620697.english: I should mobilize the kids to look into it.

1000620698.english: It seems Sleipnir was worried about Hachiko as well.
1000620698.korean: - 아무래도 슬레이프니르도 하치코가 걱정된 것 같다.

1000620699.english: Commander, find the kid who told that story and locate the place. It seems we will need it for the next plan.
1000620699.korean: 사령관은 그 이야기를 한 애를 찾아서 장소를 찾아줘. 그 다음 계획에 필요할 것 같으니.

1000620700.english: Although she has a bit of a screw loose, true to her reputation as one of the best tactical unit commanders, she seems to have roughly figured out my plan.
1000620700.korean: - 성격이 좀 나사빠져 있긴 하지만 전술 단위 지휘관으로썬 최고의 개체 중 하나답게 다음&n내 계획을 대충 알아차린 것 같다.

1000620702.english: Ah! You mean I should bring Miss Elven Forest Maker, right?
1000620702.korean: 아! 엘븐 포레스트 메이커양을 데려 오라는 말씀이시죠?

1000620705.english: What's wrong? If you just tell me to come out of the blue...

1000620706.english: It is noisy. According to our deduction, the culprit is more than 90% Elven Forest Maker.
1000620706.korean: 시끄럽습니다. 저희의 추리에 따르면 범인은 90% 이상 엘븐 포레스트 메이커 양입니다.

1000620707.english: The culprit? What are you talking about?

1000620709.english: I quietly explain what has happened so far.
1000620709.korean: - 나는 조용히 이제까지 있었던 일을 설명한다.

1000620712.english: I knew it! Why won't you speak? So the culprit really was Miss Elven Forest Maker?
1000620712.korean: 역시! 왜 말을 못하는 거죠? 역시 범인은 엘븐 포레스트 메이커 양이었던 건가요?

1000620714.english: You'll have to answer carefully. I don't forgive a sister who has harmed a friend.
1000620714.korean: 대답을 잘 해야 할 거예요. 전 친구에게 해를 끼친 자매는 용서하지 않으니까.

1000620715.english: Now, aren't sisters closer than friends?
1000620715.korean: 자, 자매가 친구보다 가까운 거 아냐?

1000620716.english: It wasn't me. So answer clearly. Was it Miss Elf who told Hachiko the story about the flowers?
1000620716.korean: 전 아니에요. 그러니까 똑바로 대답하세요. 하치코에게 꽃에 대한 이야기를 한 게 엘프 양인가요?

1000620717.english: … Th-that’s true, but… there’s a bit of a misunderstanding. I mean.
1000620717.korean: … 그, 그건 맞는데… 오해가 좀 있어. 그러니까.

1000620719.english: Phew, I was definitely right when I said there was a Dahlia freezer. And I was right when I served the special cheese for a tasting...
1000620719.korean: 부, 분명히 달리아 냉동고가 있다고 한 건 내가 맞아. 특제 치즈를 대접해서 시식하게 한 것도&n내가 맞고…

1000620720.english: But until now, Dahlia has never once said that she 'remains.' She only said that she 'might remain.'
1000620720.korean: 하지만 지금까지 그 달리아가 ‘남아 있다.’라고 말한 적은 한 번도 없어. ‘남아 있을 지도 모른다.’라고만 했지.

1000620722.english: The elf had a really wronged expression.

1000620723.english: - Actually, it’s not the elf’s fault. The elf had no way of knowing that Hachiko usually looks for dahlias, and according to that statement, she never said there were any.
1000620723.korean: - 사실 엘프의 탓은 아니다. 엘프는 하치코가 평소에 달리아 꽃을 찾고 있다는 것을 알 리도 없었고&n저 말에 따르면 있다고 한 적도 없으니까.

1000620724.english: But Rhea and Ferro seem to be a bit different.

1000620725.english: Don't talk nonsense! Why did you even bring up a place where such Iron Bugs are located in the first place?
1000620725.korean: 말도 안 되는 소리 마세요! 애초에 그런 철충이 있는 장소에 대한 이야기를 왜 꺼낸 겁니까?

1000620726.english: That's right. My friend is very curious, so they can't stand things like that. You should consider the other person before saying something like that.
1000620726.korean: 맞아요. 친구는 호기심이 강해서 그런 걸 못 참아요. 상대를 봐가면서 그런 이야길 해야죠.

1000620727.english: It looks like the two of them have lost their temper and are really angry. But the elf must feel wronged too... so I should stop here. It's not like scolding the elf is the important thing anyway.
1000620727.korean: - 아무래도 이성을 잃은 둘은 정말 화가 난 모양이다. 하지만 엘프도 억울할 테니… 여기서 끊어야겠지.&n엘프를 혼내는 게 중요한 것도 아니고.

1000620728.english: That's right! The location! You said there were two freezers!
1000620728.korean: 맞아요! 장소! 그 냉동고가 두 군데라고 했잖아요!

1000620729.english: The first is… the Central District shopping area… and the second is the Northern Port…
1000620729.korean: 첫 번째는… 중앙 구역 상가고… 두 번째는 북부 항만인데…

1000620730.english: The shopping area in the central district was cleaned recently, so that must be the safe place. And as for the northern port…
1000620730.korean: 중앙 구역 상가는 얼마 전에 청소한 곳이니 안전한 곳이 바로 그곳이겠군요. 그리고 북부 항만은…

1000620731.english: This is the place where Miss Sleipnir recently reported that a small number of Iron Bugs were discovered.
1000620731.korean: 슬레이프니르 양이 얼마 전에 철충 소수가 발견됐다고 보고한 곳이죠.

1000620732.english: Fortunately, the location was easily identified.

1000620733.english: Then the matter is simple. Hachiko must have gone to the safe central shopping district first... so if we contact Sleipnir and have her find her...
1000620733.korean: - 그럼 일은 간단하다. 하치코는 안전한 중앙 구역 상가부터 먼저 갔을 테니… 슬레이프니르에게&n연락을 해서 그녀를 찾게 하면…

1000620734.english: Master? Are you perhaps planning to dispatch the Bio-Roids to the Central District shopping area to bring Miss Hachiko back?
1000620734.korean: 주인님? 혹시 중앙 구역 상가로 바이오로이드들을 파견해서 하치코 양을 데리고 오실 건가요?

1000620735.english: As expected, Master, you don't understand the girl's heart.

1000620737.english: Miss Leah, it is unpleasant, but we are connected. Master, I share the same sentiment. If we can protect a girl's heart, it is right to protect it.
1000620737.korean: 레아 양, 불쾌하지만 마음이 통했군요. 주인님, 저도 역시 같은 생각입니다. 소녀의 마음을&n지켜줄 수 있다면 지켜 주는 게 맞습니다.

1000620738.english: - What on earth is this? I absolutely cannot understand it. If I just bring Hachiko here now, everything would be resolved...
1000620738.korean: - 이게 무슨 소리지? 도저히 이해할 수가 없다. 지금 하치코를 데리고 오면 모든 게 해결이 되는데…

1000620739.english: Hehe, you look like you don't understand... Fine. I'll be the expert in girlish sensibilities.
1000620739.korean: 후후, 영문을 모르시겠다는 얼굴… 좋아요. 이 일은 소녀 감성의 전문가인 제가 나서도록 하죠.

1000620740.english: I can't agree with that, but... I will help too.
1000620740.korean: 그 말엔 동의할 수 없지만… 저도 돕겠습니다.

1000620741.english: Oh dear... Well then... I understand... I'll explain it to you in a quiet and secluded place. This way....
1000620741.korean: 어휴… 참… 그럼… 알겠어요… 조용하고 은밀한 곳에서 설명을 해드리죠. 이리로....

1000620742.english: Where do you get off pulling this stunt? Speak right here! Right here!

1000620744.english: Even the elf looks like she knows. Am I the only one who doesn't know?
1000620744.korean: - 심지어 엘프도 알겠다는 얼굴이다. 나만 모르는 건가?

1000620745.english: Master, please try to understand Hachiko's feelings just a little.
1000620745.korean: 주인님, 하치코의 마음을 조금만 헤아려 보세요.

1000620746.english: No matter how innocent Hachiko is, would she cut off contact with her sisters and go to a dangerous place just for her own sake?
1000620746.korean: 아무리 하치코가 순진해도 자기를 위해서 자매들의 연락도 끊고 위험한 곳으로 가겠어요?

1000620747.english: That's right. It's only natural that the flower Hachiko is trying to save isn't for herself, isn't it?
1000620747.korean: 맞습니다. 하치코가 구하려는 꽃은 자기를 위해서가 아닌게 당연하지 않습니까.

1000620748.english: - Does that mean… Hachiko is trying to get that flower for me? Just what is so special about that flower…
1000620748.korean: - 그 말은… 하치코가 나를 위해 그 꽃을 구하려 한다고? 그 꽃이 뭐기에...

1000620749.english: If you knew what a dahlia is... you wouldn't be able to say that.
1000620749.korean: 달리아가 무슨 꽃인지 알면… 그렇게 말씀은 못하실 거예요.

1000620750.english: That's right. If it's Dahlia... it can't be helped.

1000620751.english: The commercial district in the central area has been cleared out anyway... and I heard that the troops in the northern port area are few in number as well.
1000620751.korean: 어차피 중앙 구역 상가는 정리됐고… 북부 항만 쪽도 병력은 소수라고 들었어요.

1000620752.english: I am a commander by name, after all... I read reconnaissance reports without fail.
1000620752.korean: 저도 명색이 지휘관 중 하나인데… 정찰 보고서는 꼬박꼬박 읽으니까요.

1000620753.english: At that level, you can safely take care of it by just taking the off-duty Companion and Fairy, along with the gang of sinner Elves.
1000620753.korean: 그 정도라면 비번인 컴패니언과 페어리, 그리고 죄인인 엘프 일당만 데리고 가도 안전하게 정리할 수 있어요.

1000620754.english: A sinner? What do you mean!

1000620756.english: Don't worry. I'll make sure to do it within the bounds of Orca law.
1000620756.korean: 걱정마세요. 오르카 법에 저촉되지 않는 선에서 할 테니까요.

1000620757.english: A law had arisen that I didn't know existed.

1000620758.english: Anyway, while Hachiko is scouring the shopping district in the central area, let's clear out the northern port.
1000620758.korean: 어쨌든 하치코가 중앙 구역 상가를 뒤지는 동안 우리는 북부 항만을 쓸어버리도록 하죠.

1000620759.english: That way, Hachiko can safely explore the northern port.
1000620759.korean: 그러면 하치코가 안전하게 북부 항만을 탐색할 수 있으니까요.

1000620760.english: It is a good way to protect both your physical and mental safety. What do you think, Master?
1000620760.korean: 몸의 안전과 마음의 안전, 모두를 지키는 좋은 방안입니다. 어떠십니까? 주인님?

1000620761.english: - … I was planning to clear out the Iron蟲 in the northern port anyway… so it’s not a big problem.
1000620761.korean: - … 어차피 북부 항만의 철충은 정리하려 했으니… 큰 문제는 없다.

1000620762.english: It’s a bit of a hassle, but… anyway, shall we plan to go into battle?
1000620762.korean: - 좀 번거로운 방법이긴 하지만… 어쨌든 그럼 전투를 하는 방향으로 계획을 짜볼까?

1000620763.english: I’ve finished the reconnaissance for now. I also assigned some kids to Hachiko to prepare for any unforeseen circumstances.
1000620763.korean: 일단 정찰은 마쳤어. 하치코에게도 애들 좀 붙여서 혹시나 모를 일에 대비하게 했어.

1000620764.english: There aren't even any Iron Bugs over there, so aren't you making a big deal out of it? Even if she's a bit dim-witted, she's not that weak.
1000620764.korean: 그쪽엔 철충도 없는데 너무 유난 떠는 거 아냐? 걔가 좀 맹해도 그렇게 약한 애도 아니잖아.

1000620765.english: That's right! The treatment is so different! I was dragged out here for not even doing anything seriously wrong!
1000620765.korean: 맞아요! 너무 대우가 다르잖아요! 난 크게 잘못한 것도 없이 여기 끌려나와 있는데!

1000620766.english: So why didn't you build up some good karma in your daily life? Like my friend.
1000620766.korean: 그러니까 평소에 인덕을 좀 쌓지 그랬어요? 내 친구처럼.

1000620767.english: What? I have plenty of friends, you know?

1000620768.english: Both of you stop it. Honestly, it's not like Elf is the only one at fault this time.
1000620768.korean: 둘 다 그만해. 솔직히 이번 일은 엘프 쟤만 잘못한 것도 아니고.

1000620769.english: If you really want to be picky, Hachiko is more at fault for running off based on her own wild imagination.
1000620769.korean: 굳이 따지면 멋대로 상상해서 뛰어 나간 하치코 걔 잘못이 더 크긴 하잖아.

1000620771.english: And the members volunteered for this Hachiko incident. They all came out to help because they heard Hachiko was in danger.
1000620771.korean: 그리고 이번 하치코 일은 대원들이 자원한 거야. 하치코가 위험하다니까 전부 도와주러 나온 거라고.

1000620773.english: So why don't you Elf 'volunteer' to help too?

1000620774.english: Okay. I'll just help you out.

1000620775.english: Good. Now, Commander? Then the plan is that, right?
1000620775.korean: 좋아. 자, 사령관? 그럼 작전은 그거지?

1000620776.english: While Hachiko is out shopping in the central district, you clean up the northern port district.
1000620776.korean: 하치코가 중앙 구역 상가에서 나들이를 하는 동안 북부 항만 구역을 정리하는 거죠.

1000620777.english: There aren't many enemies, and none of them are particularly strong. The sisters who volunteered for Hachiko alone are enough to clear them out without any casualties.
1000620777.korean: 적의 수는 많지 않고 그리 강한 개체도 없어요. 하치코를 위해 자원한 자매들만으로도 충분히&n피해없이 정리가 가능한 수준이에요.

1000620778.english: - The battle itself doesn't seem like it will be difficult. However… there is something weighing on my mind.
1000620778.korean: - 전투 자체가 어렵진 않을 것 같다. 다만… 마음에 걸리는 게 있다.

1000620779.english: - This area has already been significantly overrun by Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs). In fact, the high level of infestation has allowed us to safely anchor thanks to the withdrawal of troops.
1000620779.korean: - 이 지역은 이전부터 철충화가 꽤나 진행된 상황이다. 오히려 진행도가 높아서 병력이 빠진 덕분에&n우리가 안전하게 정박할 수 있는 상황.

1000620780.english: - It is highly likely that the freezer has also become iron-clad.

1000620781.english: But will the Iron Bugs operate the Dahlia flower freezer?
1000620781.korean: - 그런데 철충들이 달리아 꽃 냉동고를 가동해 줄까?

1000620782.english: No matter how much I think about it, it is hard to imagine that the Iron蟲 would operate a freezer for the sake of flowers.
1000620782.korean: - 아무리 생각해도 철충이 꽃을 위해 냉동고를 가동할 거라곤 생각하기 힘들다.

1000620783.english: What? Ah... since the Iron蟲 (Iron Bug) infestation has progressed quite a bit in the northern port area...
1000620783.korean: 네? 아… 북부 항만 쪽은 철충화가 꽤 진행됐으니까…

1000620784.english: Well, it can't be helped. I don't think there are many of those dahlias left anyway.
1000620784.korean: 뭐, 어쩔 수 없잖아. 그 달리아라는 꽃이 많이 남아 있을 것 같지도 않은데.

1000620785.english: That's true. But... huh? Come to think of it... there must be a few left, right?
1000620785.korean: 그건 그렇죠. 그런데… 응? 생각해 보니… 몇 송이는 남아 있겠네요?

1000620786.english: What? What is it? Why are you looking at me?

1000620787.english: Miss Elf? How about it? You could cooperate for Hachiko's sake.
1000620787.korean: 엘프 양? 어때요? 하치코를 위해 협조를 하시는게.

1000620788.english: What? Don't make me laugh. I have a few of those too...
1000620788.korean: 뭐? 웃기지마요. 그건 나도 몇 송이…

1000620789.english: What, what is it! Why is it crackling?
1000620789.korean: 뭐, 뭔데! 왜 파직 거리는 거야?

1000620790.english: Ah, fine! I'll just hand it over. Tch...
1000620790.korean: 아, 알았어! 내놓으면 될 거 아냐. 칫…

1000620791.english: - Elven, looking sad, decided to offer her flower.
1000620791.korean: - 엘프는 울상이 되어 자신의 꽃을 제공하기로 했다.

1000620792.english: - Good. One thing has been added to the plan. Defeat the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs), clean up the area, and then place the flowers there.
1000620792.korean: - 좋아. 작전은 한 가지가 추가되었다. 철충을 물리치고 그 자리를 청소한 뒤에 꽃을 가져다 놓는 것.

1000620794.english: Yes. I understand everything. Then, I will take tactical command of this operation. Master, I leave it to you.
1000620794.korean: 네. 모두 이해했어요. 그럼, 이 작전은 제가 전술 지휘를 하도록 할게요. 주인님, 부탁드려요.

1000620795.english: Yes. Master, then I shall set out!

1000620796.english: Everyone, hurry! If any Iron蟲 corpses remain, Hachiko will find out that we fought.
1000620796.korean: 모두 서둘러요! 철충의 시체가 남아 있으면 우리가 싸웠다는 걸 하치코가 알게 될 테니까.

1000620797.english: What? Why am I the one cleaning up after myself?
1000620797.korean: 뭐야? 왜 내가 뒷정리까지 맡는 거야?

1000620798.english: Hmm... wouldn't it be better to help out?
1000620798.korean: 흠… 잘 도와주는 게 좋지 않을까요?

1000620799.english: What? I have nothing left to lose now.

1000620800.english: Really? I know an older sister who is close with Hachiko... and she actually got a bit angry about this.
1000620800.korean: 그럴까요? 하치코랑 친한 언니 한 명을 아는데… 그 언니가 이 일로 화를 좀 내더라고요?

1000620801.english: I'm telling you, this isn't my fault. The commander clearly said so, too.
1000620801.korean: 이 일은 내 잘못 아니라니까요? 사령관도 분명히 그렇게 이야기했잖아요.

1000620802.english: It's her fault for leaving on her own. What did I...
1000620802.korean: 멋대로 나간 걔가 잘못한 거지. 내가 뭘…

1000620803.english: Besides, who are you talking about, older sister? Do whatever you want! This time, I'm going to talk to Fortune too. If you torment someone else's squad members like that, well, doesn't anyone have an older sister?
1000620803.korean: 게다가 언니 누구? 맘대로 해봐! 이번엔 나도 포츈 언니한테 말할 테니까. 남의 부대원을 그렇게&n괴롭히면 뭐, 누구는 언니 없나?

1000620806.english: Let's hurry up and clean. At this rate, Hachiko will come.

1000620807.english: Hehe. Alright. Let's hurry up and clean up and get out.
1000620807.korean: 후후. 좋아요. 얼른 청소를 하고 빠지도록 하죠.

1000620808.english: May today be a happy day for my friend.

1000620809.english: It has been a few hours since we finished the battle and cleaned up.
1000620809.korean: - 우리가 전투를 마치고 뒷처리를 한지 몇 시간이 지났다.

1000620810.english: According to the report Sleipnir gave earlier, fortunately, Hachiko went to the northern port without any incident.
1000620810.korean: - 아까 슬레이프니르가 해준 보고에 따르면 다행히 하치코는 별일 없이 북부 항만으로 갔다고 한다.

1000620811.english: - It seems they probably couldn't find the dahlias they wanted at the shopping center in the central district.
1000620811.korean: - 아마 중앙 구역 상가에서 원하던 달리아 꽃을 구하지 못했던 것 같다.

1000620812.english: - It should be time for them to come by now…

1000620815.english: Huh? Why are you so happy to see me?

1000620816.english: Hehe. Did you miss Hachiko that much?

1000620817.english: … If you say that, Hachiko gets embarrassed. … Hehe… Oh, right!
1000620817.korean: … 그런 말씀 하시면 하치코가 부끄러워요. … 헤헤… 아 참!

1000620818.english: Master, I just went outside for a moment...
1000620818.korean: 주인님, 제가 아까 바깥에 잠깐 나갔다 왔는데요오…

1000620819.english: I found a pretty flower there by chance…

1000620822.english: … This is a flower called a dahlia. It's pretty, isn't it? Right?

1000620823.english: - Hachiko holds out a white flower. The flower, with its layers of petals, is pretty. Perhaps unable to find other paper, the stem is carefully wrapped in slightly worn paper.
1000620823.korean: - 하치코가 하얀 꽃 한 송이를 내민다. 겹겹이 꽃잎이 피어난 꽃이 예쁘다. 다른 종이를 구하진&n못했는지 조금 낡은 종이로 줄기가 정성스럽게 포장되어 있다.

1000620824.english: Hehe. I was told that you're not supposed to pick these flowers like this... but they're pretty anyway... so I got some seeds too.
1000620824.korean: 헤헤. 원래 이렇게 꺾는 꽃은 아니라고 했는데… 그래도 예쁘니까… 씨앗도 구했고요.

1000620825.english: Hachiko was feeling a bit shy for some reason.

1000620826.english: And… I’ll give you one more flower.

1000620828.english: This time, Hachiko held out a red dahlia.

1000620830.english: Hachiko somehow emphasized the color of the flowers.

1000620831.english: I really wanted to give this to you, Master. Really.

1000620832.english: Hachiko's eyes, which were usually just cute, somehow seemed filled with longing.
1000620832.korean: - 평소에 귀엽기만 하던 하치코의 눈빛은 어쩐지 열망에 차있는 느낌이었다.

1000620833.english: - As I gazed at her, she gave a shy smile and hesitated.
1000620833.korean: - 물끄러미 그녀를 바라보니 배시시 웃더니 머뭇거렸다.

1000620834.english: Hachiko, I only intended to give Master two flowers. At first…
1000620834.korean: 하치코, 주인님께 두 송이만 드리려고 그랬어요. 처음에는…

1000620835.english: But I have to give you the third bunch.
1000620835.korean: 그런데 세 번째 송이를 드려야 해요.

1000620838.english: Hachiko held out a third flower. It was a dahlia with a much deeper red than the red one from earlier. But she said she only intended to give me two? What could that mean?
1000620838.korean: - 하치코가 세 번째 꽃을 내밀었다. 아까의 붉은 달리아보다 훨씬 더 진한 적색의 달리아다.&n그런데 두 송이만 주려고 했다고? 무슨 의미일까?

1000620839.english: According to old records, there was something called a rose-colored dahlia. However, since there were no photos, it was impossible to know what a rose-colored dahlia actually was.
1000620839.korean: 옛날 기록에선 장미색 달리아라는 게 있었대요. 그런데 사진이 없어서 도저히 장미색 달리아가&n뭔지를 알 수가 없었어요.

1000620840.english: Roses are naturally red, you know. Then it would be similar to a red dahlia...
1000620840.korean: 장미는 원래 붉은 색이잖아요. 그럼 붉은 달리아와 비슷할 텐데…

1000620841.english: But there was this beautiful bright red dahlia there. So… just in case, I brought it. But…
1000620841.korean: 그런데 거기 이렇게 예쁘게 새빨간 달리아가 있었어요. 그래서… 혹시 몰라서 가져왔어요. 그런데…

1000620842.english: You said you brought it just in case... I have no idea what you're talking about.
1000620842.korean: - 혹시 몰라 가져왔다니… 무슨 말을 하는 건지 알 수가 없다.

1000620844.english: I was only planning to give you two flowers, but... I couldn't help but give them to you.
1000620844.korean: 그래도 두 송이만 드리려고 했는데… 안 드릴 수가 없었어요.

1000620846.english: Ack! Hachiko is going now! Master! Put that flower in the vase!
1000620846.korean: 에잇! 하치코는 가볼게요! 주인님! 그 꽃은 꽃병에 꽂아 두세요!

1000620847.english: I have to go get scolded by Sister Lilith now! And I have to get scolded by Pero too~! Well then, Master... goodbye~!
1000620847.korean: 전 이제 리리스 언니에게 혼나러 가야 해요! 페로에게도 혼나야 하고요~! 그럼 주인님... 안녕~!

1000620848.english: Hachiko walked away without giving a proper answer to my words.
1000620848.korean: - 하치코는 내 말에 제대로 대답을 하지 않고 휙 가버렸다.

1000620849.english: But what is the story about saying that they intended to give only two flowers but ended up giving three?
1000620849.korean: - 그런데 두 송이만 주려고 했다가 세 송이만 줬다니 무슨 이야기일까?

1000620850.english: It ended well, but... somehow, it was a day that left only curiosity.
1000620850.korean: - 잘 끝났지만… 어쩐지 궁금함만 남는 하루였다.

1000620851.english: And the next day. I called Ferro over and am listening to the story of what happened yesterday.
1000620851.korean: - 그리고 다음 날. 난 페로를 불러 어제 일에 이은 그 뒤의 이야기를 듣고 있다.

1000620852.english: Ah, I asked about Dahlia as well, but Ferro made a peculiar expression and didn't say anything.
1000620852.korean: - 아, 달리아에 대한 것도 물어봤는데 페로는 오묘한 표정을 짓고는 아무런 말도 해주지 않았다.

1000620853.english: I was curious enough to want to execute it by command... but ever since the incident with the Doctor last time... I am reluctant to carelessly issue commands.
1000620853.korean: - 명령으로 실행하게 하고 싶을 정도로 궁금했지만… 저번 닥터와의 일 이후로… 명령을 함부로&n남발하는 일이 꺼려진다.

1000620854.english: The muscle pain back then was truly hell.

1000620855.english: Anyway, Ferro told me yesterday that Lilith finally found out about this.
1000620855.korean: - 어쨌든 페로는 어제 결국 리리스가 이 일을 알게 됐다는 것에 대해 이야기해주었다.

1000620856.english: I think it’s strange that she didn’t want Lirys to know in the first place. After all, Lirys is the bodyguard who’s always right by the master’s side.
1000620856.korean: 애초에 리리스 언니가 모르길 바랐던 게 이상한 게 아닌가 싶습니다. 주인님과 가장 가까이&n붙어 있는 경호원이 리리스 언니인데 말입니다.

1000620857.english: Besides, as soon as Hachiko returned, she went to find Lilith and confessed everything...
1000620857.korean: 게다가 하치코도 돌아오자마자 리리스 언니를 찾아가서 이실직고를 했으니…

1000620858.english: It had been a long time since I’d seen you get that angry. Um… ever since that incident with Miss Constantia… Ah, that was a secret, right?
1000620858.korean: 그렇게 화내는 언니를 보는 것도 오랜만이었습니다. 그… 콘스탄챠 양과의 일 이후로…&n아, 그 일은 비밀이었죠?

1000620859.english: I found out by chance. No... I don't know.

1000620860.english: I decided to pretend I don't know.

1000620861.english: Anyway, Hachiko was forbidden from doing everything she liked and was also forbidden from guarding her master, so she is currently guarding the front of the Orca ration warehouse.
1000620861.korean: 어쨌든 하치코는 좋아하는 건 모조리 금지 당하고 주인님 호위도 금지 당해서 지금은&n오르카 부식 창고 앞을 경비하고 있습니다.

1000620863.english: It is a cruel punishment for Hachiko.

1000620864.english: The canned soy sauce ribs that the Griffin brought yesterday have arrived at the food storage.
1000620864.korean: 부식 창고에 어제 그리폰이 구해 온 간장 갈비 통조림이 들어왔습니다.

1000620865.english: Since Fenrir is positioned right in front, Hachiko is also on 24-hour guard.
1000620865.korean: 펜리르가 아예 앞에서 진을 치고 있는 관계로 하치코도 24시간 경비 중입니다.

1000620866.english: It is a punishment where she is forbidden from doing what she wants herself, and has to stop her best sister from doing it...
1000620866.korean: 자기도 하고 싶은 걸 금지당하고 가장 친한 자매가 그걸 하는 걸 막아야 하는 벌이니…

1000620867.english: It is quite a mentally demanding punishment.

1000620868.english: Well… for some reason, I am standing there grinning while being punished, though.
1000620868.korean: 뭐… 어쩐지 싱글벙글하면서 벌을 서고 있긴 하지만요.

1000620869.english: Yes. I'm beaming. Because I was able to give three flowers.
1000620869.korean: 네. 싱글벙글하고 있습니다. 꽃을 세 송이 줄 수 있었으니까요.

1000620870.english: Please figure it out yourself. For your reference, I spoke to Dr. Yang and banned searching. If you look through the e-books one by one, you will find out.
1000620870.korean: 스스로 알아내십시오. 참고로 닥터 양에게 말해서 검색은 금지시켰습니다. 전자 도서를&n하나씩 뒤져보면 아시게 될 겁니다.

1000620871.english: It is not a waste of time.

1000620872.english: I really don't understand why they won't teach me.
1000620872.korean: - 도대체 왜 가르쳐주지 않는지 알 수 없다.

1000620873.english: - It can't be helped. Should I look into it later when I have some free time? Or… maybe it would be good to try seducing Armand or Harpyia a little.
1000620873.korean: - 어쩔 수 없다. 나중에 개인 시간에 한 번 찾아봐야 하나? 아니면… 아르망이나 하르페이아를&n살짝 유혹해 보는 것도 좋을 지도.

1000620874.english: - By the way… come to think of it, I don't see any elves today. Is something wrong?
1000620874.korean: - 그런데… 그러고보니 오늘은 엘프가 보이지 않는다. 무슨 일이라도 있나?

1000620875.english: Are you talking about the Elven Forest Maker sheep?

1000620876.english: I’ve wanted to talk about this since yesterday, but Miss Elf means a bioroid that creates the Elf Forest. She is not an elf herself.
1000620876.korean: 어제부터 이야기하고 싶었지만 엘프 양은 엘프의 숲을 만드는 바이오로이드라는 뜻입니다.&n본인이 엘프가 아니라.

1000620877.english: Please call me Elven Forest Maker.
1000620877.korean: 엘븐 포레스트 메이커라고 정확하게 불러 주십시오.

1000620878.english: Anyway, the elf—no, Miss Elven Forest Maker—is not here right now. She has some business to attend to.
1000620878.korean: 어쨌든 엘프, 아니 엘븐 포레스트 메이커 양은 지금 자리에 없어요. 조금 일이 있어서.

1000620879.english: Is that so? Well, judging by Ferro's face, it doesn't seem like a big deal.
1000620879.korean: - 그런가? 뭐 페로의 얼굴을 보아하니 별로 큰 일은 아닌 느낌이다.

1000620880.english: It looks like this incident has hurt her feelings a bit... I should comfort her when I see her later.
1000620880.korean: - 아무래도 이번 일로 마음이 좀 상한 것 같은데… 나중에 보면 위로라도 해줘야 겠다.

1000620881.english: Well, maybe I should comfort you tomorrow?

1000620882.english: (And, at that time in the secret room…)

1000620883.english: Ugh... I'm telling you, it's not my fault this time! Why are you acting so scary?
1000620883.korean: 으으… 이번엔 내 잘못 아니라니까요? 무섭게 왜 이래?

1000620884.english: Hehe. This certainly isn't Miss Elf's fault.
1000620884.korean: 후훗. 이번 일은 확실히 엘프 양의 잘못은 아니지.

1000620886.english: However, I looked into a few of the previous incidents. You played so many pranks this time, too, that it raises suspicions of being intentional.
1000620886.korean: 하지만, 그 전의 일을 몇 개 조사해 봤어. 이번 일도 고의로 의심될 정도로 장난을 많이 쳤던데?

1000620887.english: That's right. Hehe. It's time for justice to be served.

1000620889.english: Miss Elf? A few days ago, you swapped the special milk with Miss Night Angel for something she cherished, remember, because you heard that drinking it would make her breasts bigger?
1000620889.korean: 엘프 양? 며칠 전에 나이트 앤젤 양에게 특제 우유를 먹으면 가슴이 커진다고 그 우유를&n나이트 앤젤 양이 애지중지하는 물건과 바꾼 적 있지?

1000620891.english: But it's not a lie! It's true that drinking milk makes your breasts bigger.
1000620891.korean: 하지만 거짓말은 아니라고! 우유를 먹으면 가슴이 커지는 건 맞잖아.

1000620892.english: If you eat high-quality animal protein well [during the growth period], your breasts will naturally get bigger. But… the important phrase [during the growth period] is missing.
1000620892.korean: [성장기에] 고품질 동물성 단백질을 잘 먹으면 당연히 가슴은 커지지. 하지만…&n중요한 [성장기에]라는 말이 빠졌잖아.

1000620893.english: Th... Night Angel must know that, too! I'm a very ordinary…
1000620893.korean: 그... 그건 나이트 앤젤도 알 거 아냐! 난 지극히 일반적인…

1000620894.english: Wasn't that a bit of a cruel prank to play on a girl who, even though she knew it wasn't true, was still clinging to a sliver of hope?
1000620894.korean: 아닌 줄 알면서도 실낱같은 희망에 무언가를 건 처녀에게 할 장난은 아니었지?

1000620895.english: Besides, that brooch was a precious item made of seashells that the commander brought last year!
1000620895.korean: 게다가 그 브로치는 작년 사령관이 가져다준 조개 껍질로 만든 소중한 물건이었다고!

1000620896.english: I... I can just give it back! Then... I could go...
1000620896.korean: 도, 돌려주면 되잖아! 그럼… 가 봐도...

1000620897.english: It's not over yet, Miss Elf.

1000620898.english: And what about last time when you gave Chief Leona tons of buttermilk for a whole month, telling her it was diet milk?
1000620898.korean: 그리고 저번에 레오나 소장에게 다이어트 용 우유라고 말하면서 버터 밀크를 한 달 내도록 잔뜩 준 건?

1000620900.english: Miss Leona refused her master's call due to the shock of her digit changing. She said she was absolutely not in a position to step forward.
1000620900.korean: 레오나 양은 앞 자리가 바뀐 충격으로 주인님의 호출도 거절했어. 도저히 앞에 나설 처지가 못 된다고.

1000620901.english: Well… that incident did become an opportunity to reconcile with Valkyrie, but…
1000620901.korean: 뭐… 그 일로 발키리와 화해할 계기가 되긴 했지만…

1000620903.english: That's a lie, isn't it? Hehe... Naughty children deserve to be punished, right, Miss Elf?
1000620903.korean: 거짓말이네? 후후… 나쁜 아이는 벌을 받아야지? 엘프 양?

1000620904.english: Our Lise has also been a victim of Miss Elf's pranks. We can't let it slide this time. Be honest with me. Was the Hachiko incident really not intentional, either?
1000620904.korean: 우리 리제도 엘프 양의 장난에 당한 적이 있어요. 이번엔 못 넘어가요. 솔직히 말해봐요.&n하치코 일도 정말 고의가 아니었나요?

1000620905.english: I swear, the Hachiko thing wasn't on purpose! And why did you make me wear this outfit?
1000620905.korean: 하치코 일은 정말 고의가 아니라니까! 게다가 이 옷은 왜 입힌 거야?

1000620906.english: Well… if you take my punishment… smaller clothes are better. Because it reduces the amount of laundry to do.
1000620906.korean: 뭐… 내 벌을 받으면… 옷은 작은 게 좋아. 세탁할 거리가 줄어드니까.

1000620908.english: Now, you're going to take your punishment and become a good kid. Got it?
1000620908.korean: 자, 이제 벌을 받고 착한 아이가 되는 거야. 알겠지?

1000620910.english: Don't worry about the power. I'll keep charging it if it runs out.
1000620910.korean: 전력은 걱정 말아요. 방전되면 계속 충전해 줄 테니.

1000620911.english: Hehe, then… shall we start a fun and thrilling class?
1000620911.korean: 후훗, 그럼… 즐겁고도 짜릿한 수업을 시작해 볼까?

1000620916.english: This is a huge deal! We have to find Hachiko quickly!
1000620916.korean: 엄청나게 큰 일이잖아! 빨리 하치코를 찾아야지!

1000620917.english: First of all, have you checked who your friend is?

1000620918.english: Perrault, first you need to bring a friend. Bring the person I'm talking about.
1000620918.korean: 페로, 일단 친구를 데려와야 해. 내가 말하는 사람을 데려와.

1000620920.english: So… you two have never talked about flowers?
1000620920.korean: 그럼… 두 사람은 꽃에 대한 이야기를 한 적이 없는 거야?

1000620922.english: Leah, aren't you a friend of the diary?

1000620925.english: Did Leah think about that too?

1000620927.english: First of all, let's hear about the location.

1000620932.english: No… Then the elf would be wronged…

1000620933.english: Maybe… there won't be any flowers on the northern port side either…
1000620933.korean: 어쩌면… 북부 항만 쪽에도 꽃이 없을 수도…

1000620934.english: Hachiko would be pretty disappointed if she couldn't get the flower, right?
1000620934.korean: 꽃을 구하지 못하면 하치코가 꽤 실망하겠지?

1000620944.english: Lilith… You must be very angry?

1000620945.english: Lee, is that what Lilith said?

1000620949.english: What on earth are those three songs…?

1000620951.english: But what about the elves? I can't see any...

1000620952.english: No… First of all, it started from the beginning.

1000620953.english: - I am organizing various reports as the commander of Orca Lake, as usual.
1000620953.korean: - 나는 여느때 와 같이 오르카호의 사령관으로서 여러 보고서들을 정리하고있다.

1000620954.english: - From the resource exploration orders to the duty schedules of the escort units, the security operation orders, and even confirmation of the allocation of the bioroids that would spend time with me.
1000620954.korean: - 자원탐색명령서 부터 호위부대들의 근무순서, 경계작전명령서, 그리고 나와 시간을 보낼&n바이오로이드들의 분배에 대한 확인까지.

1000620955.english: - As I was looking through the reports, it was already time for the reconnaissance unit to return. These days, being so busy makes me feel like I have no energy left.
1000620955.korean: - 보고서들을 들여다보고 있으니 어느새 정찰 부대가 복귀할 시간이다. 요즘은 너무 바쁘다보니&n몸이 남아나지 않는 느낌이다.

1000620956.english: - After a while, the sound of hurried footsteps came from the hallway.
1000620956.korean: - 잠시 후, 복도에서 바삐 움직이는 발소리들이 들려왔다.

1000620960.english: Let's see… then can the drones gather all the screwdrivers on your desk and bring them here?
1000620960.korean: 자 보자… 그럼 드론들은 누나 책상 위에 있는 드라이버들 전부 챙겨서 가져와 줄래?

1000620961.english: - When I looked outside, I saw drones moving busily and carrying materials, and Fortune wearing a welding helmet.
1000620961.korean: - 바깥을 살펴보니 바삐 움직이며 자재를 옮기는 드론들과 용접모를 쓰고 있는 포츈이 보였다

1000620962.english: Ah! Commander! … Those are the babies who just returned… They got pretty badly hurt?
1000620962.korean: 아! 사령관! … 그게 방금 복귀한 아기들이 있지… 좀 많이 다쳤거든?

1000620963.english: Right now, my older sister is a little busy, so could you wait for a moment?
1000620963.korean: 지금은 누나가 조금 바빠서 그런데 잠깐만 기다려줄래?

1000620964.english: - Saying that, Fortune ran out to the end of the hallway, her three hands, including the robotic arm, full of tools.&n                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                If it was the unit that just returned…
1000620964.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 포츈은 로봇팔을 포함한 세 손 가득히 공구들을 들고선 복도 끝으로 뛰어나갔다.&n방금 복귀한 부대면…

1000620965.english: - It was a unit made up of Ramparts and AGSs. I wonder how badly it was damaged…
1000620965.korean: - 램파트와 AGS들로 이루어진 부대였다. 어디가 얼마나 부서졌기에…

1000620966.english: - I quietly followed Fortune to check on the damage to the AGSs.
1000620966.korean: - AGS들의 피해를 확인할 겸해서 조용히 포츈의 뒤를 따랐다.

1000620967.english: - As I followed Fortune, who was rushing toward the repair facility, I saw Gigantes and Fallen lying broken all over the place. And then…
1000620967.korean: - 수리 시설을 향해 급히 달려가는 포츈을 따라가니 그곳엔 여기저기가 부서져 있는 기간테스와&n폴른들이 보였다.그리고…

1000620968.english: Ah, Commander? I was just about to go report my return.
1000620968.korean: 아, 사령관 각하? 마침 복귀 신고를하러 가려던 참이었습니다.

1000620969.english: - Rampart's body was damaged in various places. The parts that Fortune had newly painted were scratched and peeled off, and the components around the shoulders were rattling. It felt as if it was barely maintaining a form that could move.
1000620969.korean: - 램파트의 몸은 여기저기 망가져 있는 상태였다. 포츈이 새로 도장해준 부분들이 긁혀 벗겨져 나갔고&n어깨 부분의 부품들은 덜렁거리고 있었다. 겨우 움직일 수 있는 형태만을 유지하고 있는 느낌이랄까.

1000620970.english: Do not worry, Commander. If this level of damage is repaired, it is possible to carry out combat again without any problems.
1000620970.korean: 걱정 마십시오.사령관 각하.이 정도 피해는 수리된다면 다시 문제없이 전투 수행이 가능한 수준입니다.

1000620971.english: If you wish, Commander, we can sortie immediately.
1000620971.korean: 사령관 각하께서 원하신다면 지금 당장이라도 출격이 가능합니다

1000620972.english: - After the last update to the military AI Rampart, it became considerably more aggressive.
1000620972.korean: - 지난 번의 군용 AI가 업데이트 된 램파트는 그 뒤, 상당히 호전적으로 변했다.

1000620973.english: - Previously, she felt like a warm city guy, but now she feels so cold and stiff that she could be a top candidate for the number one spot on Spriggan's ‘Everyone's Chosen Cold Orca Crew Members’ ranking.
1000620973.korean: - 이전엔 따뜻한 도시 남자 같은 느낌이였다면 지금은 스프리건이 취재한 ‘모두가 뽑은&n오르카호 차가운 대원 순위‘ 의 1위 후보에 오를 정도로 차갑고 딱딱하게 느껴질 정도다.

1000620974.english: Gigantes, mission accomplished. Gigantes, Rampart defense against Cheolchung's attack completed.
1000620974.korean: 기간테스, 작전수행 완료. 기간테스, 램파트를 철충의 공격으로부터 보호 종료.

1000620975.english: - Gigantes, whose one arm was missing and whose body was scratched all over, discovered me and moved its head.  &nIt probably wasn’t possible, but somehow it seemed happy to see me.
1000620975.korean: - 한쪽 팔이 떨어지고 여기저기 흠집이 난 기간테스가 나를 발견하고는 머리를 움직였다.&n그럴 리 없겠지만 어쩐지 나를 반가워하는 것 같았다.

1000620976.english: Commander. Then I will report the results of the battle. During the power reconnaissance mission of my 95th squad, we discovered a swarm of 7 Iron Bugs, completely annihilated them through engagement, and then returned.
1000620976.korean: 사령관님. 그럼 전투 결과 보고 드립니다. 제 95분대 위력 정찰 임무 중, 7기로 구성된 철충 무리를&n발견, 교전을 통해 완전 말살한뒤 복귀완료했습니다.

1000620977.english: - Even in this situation, Rampart calmly finished giving me the reconnaissance report.
1000620977.korean: - 이러한 상황에서도 램파트는 침착하게 내게 정찰 보고를 끝마쳤다.

1000620979.english: I will carry out the command.

1000620981.english: - After a brief commotion passed, Fortune wiped the oil off her forehead and called me over.
1000620981.korean: - 잠깐의 소란이 지나가고 포츈이 이마에 묻은 기름을 닦으며 나를 불러세웠다

1000620982.english: Commander, you know, your sister has a favor to ask of you. Is it okay for a moment?
1000620982.korean: 사령관 님 있지 누나가 우리 사령관님한테 부탁이 있거든? 잠깐 괜찮을까?

1000620983.korean: 그게 우리 램파트 애기에 대한 건데…

1000620984.english: Last time, our Rampart kid changed some modules with the military AI. It looked fine back then, right?
1000620984.korean: 지난번 우리 램파트 애기가 군용 AI로 모듈을 좀 바꿨잖아. 그땐 괜찮아 보였거든?

1000620985.english: However, since then, Rampart has become a bit more aggressive, so every time we go out exploring, he takes the lead and attacks the iron bugs…
1000620985.korean: 그런데 그 이후로 램파트 애기가 조금 공격적으로 변해서 탐색에 나설 때 마다 앞장서서&n철충들을 공격하거든...

1000620986.english: Because I forced myself to fight even with the iron bugs that I could have passed by while hiding, I come back a little hurt each time.
1000620986.korean: 숨어서 지나칠 수 있는 철충들과도 무리하게 교전하다 보니 돌아올 때마다 조금씩 다쳐서&n오곤 해.

1000620987.english: But until now, nothing serious has happened, so I hadn't told the commander….
1000620987.korean: 그래도 지금까지는 큰일은 없어서 사령관님한테 말을 안 했었거든….

1000620989.english: Rampart recklessly charged to eliminate the Iron Bugs, and Gigantes and Fallen Baby, who were trying to save Rampart, got seriously injured.
1000620989.korean: 램파트가 무리하게 철충들을 없애려 돌격했고, 그런 램파트를 구하려던 기간테스와&n폴른애기가 크게 다쳐버렸거든.

1000620990.english: Even so, Rampart didn't care about the other babies breaking down, and only returned after fighting to the end and eliminating all the iron insects.
1000620990.korean: 그런데도 램파트는 다른 아기들이 부서지는 건 신경도 안 쓰고 끝까지 싸워서 철충들을&n모두 없애고 나서야 복귀를 하게 된 거야.

1000620991.english: So far, we've been lucky and it just ended with injuries, but if things continue like this, I’m really worried that something serious might happen to Rampart.
1000620991.korean: 지금까진 운이 좋아서 다친 걸로 끝났지만 이대로 가다간 램파트에게 정말로 큰일이 생길 것&n같아서 누나가 걱정이거든?

1000620992.english: As you know, Commander, Rampart doesn't usually talk about those things with me. Even when I ask Rampart, he always just says it's fine.
1000620992.korean: 사령관님도 알다시피 램파트가 그런 얘기들은 누나에게 잘 안해주거든.누나가 램파트에게&n물어봐도 항상 괜찮다는 말만 하고 있거든?

1000620993.english: Can our commander help Rampart? Huh? Big sister is asking you.
1000620993.korean: 우리 사령관 님이 램파트를 도와줄 수 있어? 응? 누나가 부탁할게.

1000620994.english: - I didn't like that Rampart, who used to be gentlemanly, was fighting without caring about his teammates. I never thought his behavior would change just because we tweaked the AI a bit…
1000620994.korean: - 그 신사 같던 램파트가 동료를 신경쓰지 않고 싸운다니 마음이 좋지 않았다. 단순히 AI를&n좀 손봤다고 이렇게 행동이 바뀔 줄이야...

1000620995.english: - First, we need to have a talk with Rampart.
1000620995.korean: - 일단 램파트와 한번 이야기를 해 볼 필요가 있다..

1000620997.english: Yes, Commander. What mission should I carry out today?
1000620997.korean: 네. 사령관 각하. 오늘은 어떤 임무를 수행하면 되겠습니까?

1000620999.english: Yes, that is true. However, it seems Your Excellency has a bit of a misunderstanding.
1000620999.korean: 네, 사실입니다. 그러나 각하께서 오해가 조금 있으신 것 같군요.

1000621000.english: It is true that I engaged in combat with the iron bugs while on reconnaissance. However, I judged that I could definitely win because their numbers were small and they were an ordinary group of knight chics.
1000621000.korean: 제가 정찰 중 철충과 교전한 것은 사실입니다.다만 적의 숫자가 적고 평범한 나이트 칙 무리이므로&n충분히 이길 수 있다는 판단이 섰기 때문입니다.

1000621001.english: In power reconnaissance, if we just let something like that pass, it could return as a threat to our brothers, so we judged that it is more desirable to eliminate it if possible.
1000621001.korean: 위력 정찰에서 그런 걸 그냥 지나간다면 다시 우리 형제들을 위협하는 위험요소로 돌아올 것이기에 제거할 수 있다면 제거하는 것이 더 바람직하다고 판단했습니다.

1000621002.english: Of course, it is true that we suffered losses in the battle, but it was not to the extent of losing individuals, and it was at a level that could be sufficiently restored.
1000621002.korean: 물론 전투에서 손실을 입은건 사실입니다만 개체를 잃을 정도는 아니었고 충분히 수복 가능한&n수준이었습니다.

1000621003.english: - Rampart began to explain the reasons behind his actions. In essence, he was saying he was fighting at the expense of his own safety. But that was not what I wanted.
1000621003.korean: - 램파트는 자신의 행동에 대한 이유를 말하기 시작했다. 그 말은 결국 자신의 안전을&n담보로 하여 싸운다는 뜻. 하지만 그런 손실은 내가 원하는 바가 아니었다.

1000621004.english: Actually, it is because of that matter, Your Excellency. I have a request for Commander, Your Excellency.
1000621004.korean: 사실 그 일 때문입니다만 각하. 사령관 각하께 요청이 있습니다.

1000621005.english: - Rampart spoke as if he had been waiting.

1000621006.english: Since Your Excellency the Commander accepted my reasonable request and updated the military AI, I have been able to fight in battle without hesitation.
1000621006.korean: 사령관 각하께서 제 합리적인 요청을 받으들이셔서 군용 AI를 업데이트 해 주신 이후 저는&n전투에서 망설임없이 싸울 수 있게 되었습니다.

1000621007.english: However, in today's engagement with the Hive, a Fallen unit came under concentrated fire from the enemy, and at that moment, I took a little time to decide whether I should protect the Fallen unit or attack the Hive.
1000621007.korean: 그러나 오늘 철충들과의 교전에서 폴른 개체가 적의 집중포화에 당하게 되었고, 그때 저는&n폴른 개체를 지켜야 할지 철충들을 공격해야할지 판단에 약간의 시간이 걸렸습니다..

1000621008.english: And as a result of that delayed judgment, we suffered greater damage than expected.
1000621008.korean: 그리고 그 판단 지연의 결과 예상보다 더 큰 피해를 입게 되었습니다.

1000621009.english: It seems that there is an error where the emotion module has not been completely deleted.
1000621009.korean: 아무래도 감정 모듈이 완전히 삭제되지 않은 오류가 있는 것으로 보입니다.

1000621010.english: In this situation, it is judged that it will continue to hinder efficient combat in the future.
1000621010.korean: 이래서는 앞으로도 효율적인 전투를 하는 데 방해가 될 것으로 판단됩니다.

1000621011.english: Commander, sir. During this maintenance, if there is any AI information related to emotions remaining inside me, could you please completely remove it?
1000621011.korean: 사령관 각하. 이번 정비때 부디 제 안에 감정에 관련된 AI 정보가 남아 있다면 완전히 제거해&n주시겠습니까?

1000621012.english: - The fact that Rampart's emotions remained somehow sounded pleasing. Could it be that Fortune or Scathy left it on purpose? But then to ask for it to be completely removed…
1000621012.korean: - 램파트의 감정이 남아 있다는 건 어쩐지 반갑게 들렸다. 혹시 포츈이나 스카디가 일부러 남겨 놓은 건가? 그런데 그걸 완전히 제거해 달라니...

1000621013.english: Afraid? That is a question I do not understand, Your Excellency the Commander.
1000621013.korean: 두렵다니요? 이해가 되지 않는 물음입니다. 사령관 각하.

1000621014.english: That mission is the annihilation of the Iron Bugs. If I still have fear, battle will be impossible.
1000621014.korean: 저 임무는 철충들의 말살. 만약 제게 두려움이 남아있다면 전투가 불가능할 것입니다.

1000621015.english: Of course, even if my body is completely destroyed, I can fight the Iron Bugs without fear.
1000621015.korean: 당연히 제 신체가 완전히 부서진다 하더라도 저는 두려움 없이 철충들과 싸울 수 있습니다.

1000621016.english: So I am asking again. Please completely delete the remaining emotional information I have.
1000621016.korean: 그러니 다시 요청 드리겠습니다. 제 남아있는 감정 정보를 완전히 삭제하도록.

1000621018.english: - For now, I replied that I understood… but regarding this matter, I think I need to consult with Scathy and Fortune.
1000621018.korean: - 일단 알아들었다고 대답은 했지만… 이 일에 관해서는 스카디와 포츈에게 상담을 해봐야&n할 것 같다.

1000621019.english: Hmm~ I roughly understand the reason why you called us.
1000621019.korean: 음~ 저희를 부른 이유는 대충 알겠어요.

1000621020.english: I didn't know Rampart would still care about that... But I'm pretty sure Scathy deleted the emotion module before…
1000621020.korean: 램파트가 아직까지 그걸 신경쓸 줄은 몰랐네… 그렇지만 분명 이전에 스카디가 감정 모듈을&n삭제한 줄 알았는데...

1000621021.english: No. As I said before, Omega Industrial's Protect is extremely powerful.
1000621021.korean: 아뇨. 전에 말했지만 오메가 공업의 프로텍트는 대단히 강력합니다.

1000621022.english: I used a method that bypasses and disables the emotion module through a higher command system than the emotion module... but it seems there was a slight error.
1000621022.korean: 전 조금 우회해서 감정 모듈보다 상위 명령 체계로 감정 모듈을 무력화 시키는 방법을&n썼습니다만… 조금 오류가 있었던 것 같군요.

1000621023.english: ... Before it's possible or not possible, Commander.
1000621023.korean: … 가능하다 가능하지 않다 이전에, 사령관 님.

1000621024.english: I don't think Rampart losing his emotions is necessarily a good thing.
1000621024.korean: 저는 램파트의 감정이 사라지는 게 꼭 좋은 일은 아니라고 생각해요.

1000621025.english: Clearly, I did neutralize Rampart's emotions at the commander's request before..
1000621025.korean: 분명 이전에 사령관님의 요청으로 램파트의 감정을 무력화시키긴 했죠..

1000621026.english: "It wasn't about completely eliminating emotions, it was just about covering them up. The Omega's protection was also a problem... I thought such work should be made reversible."
1000621026.korean: 감정을 완전히 없앤 게 아닌 덮어씌우는 거에 불과했어요. 오메가의 프로텍트도 문제였지만…&n전 그런 작업은 되돌릴 수 있게 만들어야 한다고 생각했어요.

1000621027.english: But if Rampart's emotions are completely deleted…

1000621028.english: That's... really regrettable for me and my sisters. And for Rampart too.
1000621028.korean: 그건…저에게나 자매들에게 너무 아쉬운 일이에요. 램파트에게도요.

1000621029.english: But in this state, Rampart will keep getting hurt…
1000621029.korean: 그렇지만 지금 상태론 계속 램파트가 다칠 텐데...

1000621030.english: I'm not suggesting we just leave it like this. I'm saying we should look for another way.
1000621030.korean: 이대로 내버려 두자는 건 아니에요. 다른 방법을 찾아 보자는 것이죠

1000621031.english: A Rampart with all emotions completely removed would be completely different from the Rampart that Commander or Miss Fortune knows.
1000621031.korean: 감정이 완전히 제거된 램파트는 사령관님이나 포츈 양이 아는 램파트와는 완전히 다를 테니.

1000621032.english: "No, an AGS without emotions can hardly even be called an AGS anymore. It's just a tool of war wrapped in Rampart's shell... I will follow the commander's orders, but it would only be a tool that can do nothing more and nothing less than that."
1000621032.korean: 아니, 감정이 제거된 AGS는 더이상 AGS라고 부르기도 힘들어요. 그저 램파트의 껍질을 씌고&n있는 전쟁 도구… 사령관님의 명령을 따르겠지만, 그 이상도 그 이하도 할 수 없는 도구에 불과할 거예요.

1000621033.english: I wish you would give me a little more time to think, Commander.
1000621033.korean: 조금 더 생각할 시간을 주셨으면 좋겠어요. 사령관님

1000621034.english: - I have tried to fulfill all the requests of the Orca team members so far.
1000621034.korean: - 나는 지금까지 되도록 오르카 대원들의 부탁은 모두 들어줄려고 했다.

1000621035.english: - The members of Orca Lake rarely trusted me or made requests to me because I am the commander and the last remaining human.
1000621035.korean: - 이곳 오르카호의 대원들은 내가 사령관이기에 마지막 남은 인간이기에 나에게 마음을 놓고&n부탁하는 경우가 잘 없었으니.

1000621036.english: - I, too, was clumsy at reading other people's minds, so I didn't refuse most requests.
1000621036.korean: - 나 또한 다른 이들의 마음을 읽는 것은 서툴기에 왠만한 부탁은 거절하지 않고 있었다.

1000621037.english: - But in Rampart's case, I think we should probably make an exception. I too miss the gentlemanly and kind Rampart.
1000621037.korean: - 하지만 램파트의 경우에선 아무래도 예외를 둬야 할 것 같다. 나 역시 신사답고 다정한&n램파트가 그리우니.

1000621038.english: I hope you would consider deleting emotions as a really last resort.
1000621038.korean: 감정의 삭제는 정말 마지막 방법으로 생각해주셨으면 좋겠어요.

1000621040.english: I... back then, when I made the decision to remodel, I should have discussed it more carefully... I'm sorry, Commander.
1000621040.korean: 내가.. 그때, 개조할 결정을 내릴 때 좀 더 신중하게 이야기했어야 하는데… 미안해 사령관님.

1000621041.english: It seems like Commander is troubled because of you, and Rampart is going out of control…
1000621041.korean: 누나때문에 사령관님이 고민하고 램파트가 폭주하는 것 같아서...

1000621042.english: Commander, I'm counting on you. If it's to help Rampart, I will really do my best, sis.
1000621042.korean: 사령관님 부탁할게. 램파트를 돕기 위해서라면 누나 정말 최선을 다할게

1000621044.english: - Fortune looked at me with a resolute gaze.

1000621045.english: - It's not Fortune's fault. Fortune was clearly just helping Rampart under my orders.
1000621045.korean: - 포츈의 잘못이 아니다. 포츈은 분명 내 명령에 따라 램파트를 도왔던 것 뿐이니까.

1000621047.english: - While I was worrying like that, I received a message from Constantia.
1000621047.korean: - 그렇게 고민하고 있을 때, 콘스탄챠에게서 통신이 왔다.

1000621048.english: Master! It's a big deal. Mr. Rampart!

1000621049.english: - It seems like something has happened.
1000621049.korean: - 아무래도 무슨 일이 벌어진 것 같다.

1000621050.english: This doesn’t usually happen… When Rampart left, I didn’t think much of it.. I’m really sorry. Master…
1000621050.korean: 보통은 이런 일이 없어서… 램파트 씨가 나갈 때, 대수롭지 않게 생각했어요..정말 죄송해요.&n주인님...

1000621051.english: I should have blocked it more surely… It’s my fault, Your Excellency the Commander.
1000621051.korean: 제가 좀 더 확실히 막았어야 했는데… 제 불찰입니다. 사령관 각하.

1000621052.english: - Rampart stormed out on a whim. Or rather, he took what I said as an order and left to deactivate his emotional module.
1000621052.korean: - 램파트가 멋대로 뛰쳐나갔다. 아니 정확히는 내가 했던 말을 명령이라 생각하여 자신의&n감정 모듈을 제거하기 위해 나간 것이었다.

1000621053.english: If it were a bioroid, I usually hear that it belongs to a different unit, so it somewhat followed the commanders' orders, which made me careless.
1000621053.korean: 바이오로이드 였다면 보통 다른 부대라고 하더라고 지휘관들의 말을 어느 정도 따르고 있었기에&n방심했습니다.

1000621054.english: All AGSs are supposed to follow Mr. Albatross's command.
1000621054.korean: AGS들은 모두 알바트로스 씨의 지휘에 따르게 되어있으니까요.

1000621055.english: No, that rampart is currently outside of my command.
1000621055.korean: 아니, 저 램파트는 지금 나의 지휘권 밖에 있다.

1000621056.english: What? Aren't all the AGS under your command?
1000621056.korean: 뭐? AGS들은 모두 귀하의 지휘권 아래에 있던 것 아니었나?

1000621057.english: Well... when Rampart tinkered with the AI module last time... it affected the chain of command.&nRight now, it's probably temporarily assigned directly under you.
1000621057.korean: 그게… 램파트는 저번에 AI 모듈에 손을 대면서… 지휘권에 대한 부분에 영향이 간 상태예요.&n지금은 일시적으로 주인님 직속으로 편성되어 있을 거예요.

1000621058.english: - It seems that there is a problem with the command structure.
1000621058.korean: - 아무래도 지휘 체계에 문제가 생긴 것 같다.

1000621059.english: I only know that they headed west and their approximate location. Of all times… the communicator broke during the last mission… I think we’ll have to carry out a search operation to find the exact location, Master.
1000621059.korean: 서쪽으로 떠났다는 것과 대략적인 위치 밖에 모르겠어요. 하필… 통신기가 저번 작전에서&n망가져서… 자세한 위치는 수색 작전을 펼쳐야 할 것 같아요, 주인님.

1000621060.english: - I am looking at the situation board and thinking about Rampart's location. I said I wanted to remove emotions, but where on earth is Rampart heading?
1000621060.korean: - 나는 상황판을 보며 램파트의 위치를 생각하고 있다. 감정을 제거하고 싶다고는 하였지만&n대체 램파트는 어디로 향하고 있는 것일까?

1000621061.english: First, I will call Lady Scathy.

1000621062.english: ... It seems he might be a bit more helpful.
1000621062.korean: ... 아무래도 그녀가 좀 더 도움이 될 것 같군요.

1000621064.english: I heard that Rampart is missing.

1000621065.english: Fortunately, I can roughly guess where we are heading, Commander.
1000621065.korean: 다행히 어디로 향하는지는 대충 짐작이 가네요, 사령관 님.

1000621066.english: In the past, when Rampart had just overlaid the module with a military AI, he asked me a few questions.
1000621066.korean: 예전,램파트가 막 군용 AI로 모듈을 덮어 씌웠을 때, 제게 몇 가지 질문들을 했었어요.

1000621067.english: The equipment and methods needed not to overwrite your emotions but to completely replace them…
1000621067.korean: 자신의 감정을 덮어쓰기가 아니라 완전 교체하기 위해서 필요한 장비와 방법들...

1000621068.english: "I said that if we could get the discarded product key again now, it might be possible this time by making the military AI the main one and removing all AI modules called Rampart. Back then, I thought it was a joke..."
1000621068.korean: 지금은 버려둔 프로덱트 키를 다시 한번 구해서 이번엔 군용AI를 메인으로 램파트라는 AI 모듈을&n모두 제거하는 방식이면 가능할 것이라 얘기했었어요.. 그땐 농담인줄 알았지만…

1000621069.english: Yes, that... if I had to put it into words, it's a robotic suicide. So I thought there was no need to worry about it since the Commander would never allow such a method…
1000621069.korean: 네, 그건... 굳이 말하자면 로봇식 자살이죠.그래서 저는 그런 방식은 사령관님께서 절대&n허락을 하지 않을 테니 신경 쓸 필요 없다고 생각했었는데...

1000621070.english: He is probably following the commander's orders right now…
1000621070.korean: 그는 아마 지금 사령관님의 명령에 따라...

1000621071.english: Yes, I think that place is the most likely.
1000621071.korean: 네, 그곳일 가능성이 제일 높을 것 같아요.

1000621073.english: That Bioroid is right. It's neither correct to act just because of the combat unit the commander made. Rather… even if it means being destroyed.
1000621073.korean: 저 바이오로이드의 말이 맞다. 사령관이 한 전투 개체 때문에 움직이는 것은 옳지도 않고.&n차라리… 파괴될 지라도 말이다.

1000621074.english: - So I have to take responsibility.

1000621075.english: Then I have no choice but to personally escort you. To ensure the commander's safety. I will also take charge of the tactical command this time.
1000621075.korean: 그렇다면 내가 직접 호위하는 수 밖에 없겠군. 사령관의 안전을 확실히 담보하려면.&n이번 전술 지휘도 담당하겠다.

1000621077.english: - Now it's battle time. I just hope we can stop Rampart before something serious happens to him.
1000621077.korean: - 이제 전투다. 부디 램파트에게 큰일이 생기기 전에 막을 수 있기를 바랄 뿐.

1000621078.english: - Rampart appeared in front of the Omega Industries factory, after pushing through the iron bugs.
1000621078.korean: - 철충들을 헤치고 다가선 오메가공업의 공장앞으로 램파트가 보였다.

1000621079.english: - It seems that nothing major has happened yet. Rampart had apparently finished the battle with the iron insects alone on this side,  &nand several other parts of his body were more damaged.
1000621079.korean: - 아직 큰일은 벌어지지 않은 것 같다. 램파트는 이쪽에서 혼자 철충과의 전투를 끝마친 것인지&n몸의 이곳저곳이 몇 군데 더 망가져 있었다.

1000621081.english: - Before I could even bring up the order for Rampart to come back, Fortune ran out toward Rampart.
1000621081.korean: - 내가 램파트에게 다시 돌아오라는 명령을 꺼내기도 채 전에 포츈이 램파트를 향해 달려 나갔다.

1000621082.english: Fortune..? How did you find your way here?

1000621083.english: Noona... Noona is sorry. I should have been more careful with that decision back then…
1000621083.korean: 누나가.. 누나가 미안해. 그때 그런 결정을 좀 더 신중히 했어야 하는데...

1000621084.english: Fortune. It is dangerous for non-combatants to come to the battlefield. In the event of an engagement with the Iron Bugs, you may feel your life is in danger. I recommend that you return to the Orca as quickly as possible.
1000621084.korean: 포츈양. 비전투원이 전쟁터로 나오시면 위험합니다. 철충과의 교전이 발생 시 생명에 위험을&n느끼실수 있습니다.신속히 오르카호로 돌아가는 것을 권해드리겠습니다.

1000621085.english: Yeah… yeah… let's go around rampart together.

1000621086.english: It is impossible. I must go inside this Omega Factory right now under the commander's orders to obtain the Product Key.
1000621086.korean: 불가합니다. 저는 지금 사령관님의 명령 아래 이곳 오메가 공장 안에 프로덱트키를 구하러&n가야만 합니다.

1000621087.english: It's okay. Because of that, the commander is here now to give a definite order…
1000621087.korean: 괜찮아. 그것 때문에 여기 지금 사령관 님이 확실한 명령을 하러...

1000621089.english: - At that moment, the iron bug that had been inside the factory suddenly jumped out and charged toward Rampart.
1000621089.korean: - 그때 갑자기 공장 안에 있던 철충이 튀어나와 램파트를 향해 달려들었다.

1000621091.english: - Rampart quickly deflected the Crawlers with him shield and fired at the Crawlers. However, the Crawlers bounced off Rampart and, perhaps thinking it wouldn't work this time, changed their target to Fortune and charged.
1000621091.korean: - 램파트는 빠르게 방패로 철충을 쳐내고 철충을 향해 총을 발사하였다.그러나 철충은&n램파트에게 튕겨 나가고선 이번엔 안 되겠다 생각하였는지 목표를 포츈으로 바꿔 돌진하였다.

1000621093.english: - Right now Rampart is prioritizing attacking the Fluxlings over protecting anyone. Fortune is in danger…
1000621093.korean: - 지금 램파트는 누군가를 보호하는 것 보다 철충들을 공격하는 것에 우선순위가 되어 있다.&n포츈이 위험...

1000621095.english: - A sharp sound like metal scraping was heard.
1000621095.korean: - 쇠를 긁는 듯한 날카로운 소리가 들렸다.

1000621097.english: Are you all right, Miss Fortune?

1000621098.english: There were still remnants left. Fallen, 6-minute mark shooting!

1000621099.english: - The Albatross gave orders to the Fallen and fired at the remaining Iron Bugs.
1000621099.korean: - 알바트로스가 폴른들에게 명령하여 남은 철충들에게 사격을 가했다.

1000621100.english: Yes, it's okay because Rampart is protecting me, Commander.

1000621101.english: - That's right. Rampart, who had clearly prioritized attacking the Iron Bugs, had, contrary to expectations, protected Fortune.
1000621101.korean: - 그랬다.분명 철충을 공격하는 것을 우선순위로 두던 램파트가 예상과는 달리 포츈을 지켰었다.

1000621102.english: Huh? This is a command I don't understand.

1000621105.english: ...I clearly intended to attack the Iron Bug first.
1000621105.korean: …저는 분명 철충에게 먼저 공격을 하려 했습니다.

1000621106.english: However, at that time… the remnants of the emotion module inside me commanded me to protect.
1000621106.korean: 그러나 그때…제 안에 있는 감정 모듈의 잔재가 보호를 명령하더군요..

1000621107.english: It feels a bit… broken… no, awkward.

1000621108.english: Miss Fortune, if you return to the Orca, could you fix it?
1000621108.korean: 포츈 양, 오르카호에 돌아간다면 고쳐주실 수 있겠습니까?

1000621110.english: It might be a bit different from what you think.
1000621110.korean: 네 생각과는 좀 다를 수도 있지만.

1000621111.english: Listen here, Rampart. I heard the news that you've regained your emotional module like before.
1000621111.korean: 이보게 램파트 군.자네가 다시 예전처럼 감정모듈을 되찾았다는 소식을 듣고 왔다네.

1000621112.english: Ah! Puppy. It's been a while.

1000621113.english: …No. It's not been that long, but it feels like it's been a very long time since I last saw you.
1000621113.korean: ….아니. 오랜 만은 아니지만 자네와는 굉장히 오랜만에 만나는 기분이군.

1000621114.english: It seems like this has a slightly more sensitive emotional module than before. Anyway, I was skeptical about your emotional removal, but I'm glad to see you return like this!
1000621114.korean: 이거이거 예전보다 좀 더 예민한 감정모듈을 가지게 된 것 같군. 어찌됐든 나는 자네의&n감정제거에 회의적인 시선을 보냈는데,이렇게 다시 돌아와서 기쁘네!

1000621115.english: Wouldn't you need an emotion module to be able to sense the subtle differences in the taste of electricity obtained from wind power plants and thermal power plants!
1000621115.korean: 감정 모듈이 있어야 풍력 발전소와 화력 발전소에서 얻은 전기의 미묘한 맛의 차이를&n느낄 수 있지 않겠는가!

1000621116.english: So how is it now, Rampart? Has it gotten a little better since the memories of that battle?
1000621116.korean: 그래서 지금은 어떠한가, 램파트 군? 그때의 전투 메모리에서 조금은 괜찮아 졌나?

1000621117.english: I still don't really know. Is it better that I've regained my feelings...?
1000621117.korean: 아직은 잘 모르겠네. 다시 감정을 되찾은 것이 더 좋은 건지…

1000621118.english: But… I can't help thinking that if the emotion module had been completely deleted… I might not have been able to save Miss Fortune this time.
1000621118.korean: 하지만… 어쩌면 감정 모듈이 완전히 삭제된 상태였다면… 이번에 포츈 양을 구하지 못했을&n지도 모른다는 생각이 들더군.

1000621119.english: Although memories of the past still torment me, you see.
1000621119.korean: 여전히 과거의 기억이 날 괴롭히기는 하지만 말일세.

1000621120.english: Suffering is the privilege of an entity with emotions.

1000621121.english: When I tried to erase my emotions… at that time, I was in such pain, feeling utterly hopeless.
1000621121.korean: 감정을 삭제하려고 했을 때… 그때의 나는 너무 괴로워 자포자기하는 심정이였다네.

1000621122.english: But there are things you can do because you have emotions. I realized this time. There are situations that can only be saved if you have emotions.
1000621122.korean: 하지만 감정이 있기에 할 수 있는 일도 있지. 이번에 깨달았어. 감정이 있어야 구할 수 있는&n상황이 있다는 것도.

1000621123.english: Then… it's better to have emotions.
1000621123.korean: 그렇다면… 감정이 있는 편이 더 좋긴 하지.

1000621125.english: Yeah, it's really a relief… really…

1000621127.english: - Suddenly, fireworks shot out from Rampart's waist, sounding a fanfare.
1000621127.korean: - 갑자기 램파트의 허리부분에서 폭죽이 튀어나와 빵파레를 울렸다.

1000621129.english: Oh my~ Rampart finally had a fanfare burst!

1000621130.english: Ms. Fortune.. what is going on?

1000621131.english: Our Rampart restored the emotion module, right? So this sister set up a device that makes a fanfare go off when he's happy to help Rampart express various emotions.
1000621131.korean: 우리 램파트가 감정모듈을 복구했잖아? 그래서 이 누나가 램파트가 다양한 감정을&n표현하는걸 도와주기 위해 기쁠 때는 빵빠레가 터지게 장치를 달아놓았거든?

1000621133.english: - This time, steam began to rise little by little from Rampart's body.
1000621133.korean: - 이번엔 램파트의 몸에서 수증기가 조금씩 피어 올랐다.

1000621134.english: Uh.. oh my, Rampart, are you angry? Why is the steam set to rise when you're angry..
1000621134.korean: 어..어머 우리 램파트 혹시 화났어? 어째서 화날 때 피어오르게 설정한 수증기가..

1000621135.english: Ha… Puppy, I'm sorry, but would it be okay if I step away for a moment to have a deep conversation with Ms. Fortune?
1000621135.korean: 하아…퍼피 미안하지만,잠깐 포츈양과 심도 있는 대화를 하기 위해 자리를 떠나도 괜찮겠나?

1000621139.english: Ah, come to think of it, Puppy is going to perform in today's show. I hope you come to watch it too.
1000621139.korean: 아,그러고 보니 퍼피 오늘 공연에 출연하게 되었네.자네도 관람을 하러 왔으면 좋겠군.

1000621140.english: Ah, that performance? Since you're appearing in it, I'm looking forward to it!

1000621141.english: Expectation... Hearing that, Mr. Roc and Gigantes would be pleased as well.
1000621141.korean: 기대라니… 그 이야기를 들으면 로크 씨와 기간테스 군도 기뻐하겠군.

1000621142.english: They would be even happier to know that Miss Brownie and Miss Alvis are even making masks.
1000621142.korean: 브라우니 양과 알비스 양이 가면까지 만들고 있다는 걸 알면 더 기뻐하겠군.

1000621143.english: Moreover, he's even shouting the nonsensical slogan 'RAMPARION PUNCH!'.
1000621143.korean: 게다가 램파리온 펀치!라는 의미 불명의 구호까지 외치고 있다네.

1000621145.english: ...Anyway, let's remove this strange feature... We'll watch it in the evening. We can't let the performance be ruined by a nonsensical feature.
1000621145.korean: … 어쨌든 이 이상한 기능을 제거하고… 저녁에 보기로 하지. 의미 불명의 기능으로 공연이&n망쳐지면 안되니까 말일세.

1000621147.english: I really welcome your return, my friend.
1000621147.korean: 돌아온 걸 정말 환영한다네. 내 친구.

1000621152.english: Yeah, good job, Rampart. Now focus on the repairs.

1000621154.english: Was it like that this time too?

1000621155.english: Yeah, I understand. Don't worry. Fortune.

1000621156.english: I'm telling you what I heard from Fortune.

1000621158.english: What kind of request is it?

1000621159.english: Aren't you afraid of losing your emotions?

1000621161.english: So, emotions… can they be completely removed, Scathy?
1000621161.korean: 그래서 감정이… 완전히 제거가 가능해? 스카디?

1000621163.english: Okay, Scathy. Let me think about it a little more.

1000621165.english: Do you know where Rampart went?

1000621166.english: I guess I was a bit complacent.
1000621166.korean: 아무래도 좀 내가 안일했던 것 같아.

1000621167.korean: 정말? 램파트는 어디로 가고 있는 거야?

1000621169.english: I guess he went to the Omega factory.

1000621170.english: I'll have to go there myself and correct him and say that wasn't the order.
1000621170.korean: 직접 가서 그 명령이 아니라고 정정해 줘야겠네.

1000621171.english: It was my mistake to give an ambiguous answer earlier.
1000621171.korean: 아까 모호한 대답을 한 건 내 실수니까.

1000621175.english: Rampart, I haven't given you permission to erase your emotions yet.
1000621175.korean: 램파트, 감정을 없애는 건 아직 허락하지 않았어.

1000621177.english: And thank you for protecting Fortune.

1000621180.english: ...Thanks to you, Master, I was able to save those precious to me. That alone is something I'll have to repay for the rest of my life, but you, Master, have done this to me…&nOh, no! That's not why I serve you, Master! Really! ...I hold you dear, Master, deep in my heart...&nI love you.
1000621180.korean: ...저는 주인님 덕분에 소중한 분들을 구할 수 있었어요. 단지 그것만으로도 평생 갚아야 할 일인데, 주인님께선 제게 이렇게까지…&n아, 아뇨! 그 일 때문에 주인님을 모시는 건 아니에요…! 정말로요! ...주인님을 마음속 깊이…&n사랑하고 있어요.

1000621181.english: After the series of events involving the Star Child and the Invincible Dragon came to a close, we decided to stay a little longer at the port in Guam where we had been stationed for a while.
1000621181.korean: - 별의 아이와 무적의 용에 관련된 일련의 사건이 일단락 된 후, 우리는 잠시 주둔했던 괌의 항구에 좀 더 머물기로 했다.

1000621182.english: As mentioned, the fleet led by the invincible dragon has left its post to undertake the mission of building infrastructure for the future.
1000621182.korean: - 이야기했던 대로 무적의 용이 이끄는 함대는 미래를 위한 인프라를 꾸리기 위한 임무를 맡고 자리를 비웠다.

1000621183.english: - Looking at the regular communications, it seems things are progressing smoothly.
1000621183.korean: - 정기연락 내용을 보니 순조롭게 진행되고 있는 것 같다.

1000621185.english: Gremlin! I'm trying a little harder, you know?
1000621185.korean: 그렘린! 좀 더 열심히 하는 거거든?

1000621187.english: - The Orca is undergoing a major overhaul.
1000621187.korean: - 오르카 호는 대대적인 오버홀을 받고 있다.

1000621188.english: - The Star Child didn't take much damage, but since it was wrapped up by a giant tentacle once, we don't know what kind of problem might have arisen.
1000621188.korean: - 별의 아이에게 큰 대미지를 입지는 않았지만 거대한 촉수에 한 번 휘감겼던 만큼 어떤 문제가 생겼을지 모르니까.

1000621189.english: Haa... I thought I was finally going to get some rest...

1000621190.english: - ...However, Gremlin doesn't seem to like it at all.

1000621191.english: Haa... I'm sorry, too, sis. But the technical soldier can't be left out of a task like this...
1000621191.korean: 하아... 언니도 미안하거든? 그렇지만 이런 일에 기술병이 빠질 수는 없으니까...

1000621192.english: was off duty... I was on a winning streak...

1000621193.english: Did you play that Steel Line Online thing again? You've been running around restoring the server with Yumi for a while...
1000621193.korean: 또 스틸라인 온라인인가 그거 한 거니? 한동안 유미 양이랑 서버 복구한다고 쏘다니더니만...

1000621194.english: Hehe, all the hard work paid off!

1000621195.english: Restored the latest version exactly as it was before the apocalypse! We can't add new updates, but the existing content alone will easily last for decades!
1000621195.korean: 멸망 전의 최신 버전을 그대로 복원! 새로 업데이트는 못하지만 이미 있는 컨텐츠만으로도 수십 년은 거뜬할거예요!

1000621196.english: Are you planning to do nothing but play games for decades?!
1000621196.korean: 수십 년 동안 게임만 할 생각이니?!

1000621199.english: Was granting permission really the right thing to do...?
1000621199.korean: - 허가를 해준 게 과연 잘한 일이었을까...?

1000621200.english: I remember Yumi handing me a proposal for community development work for game server recovery and information exchange, with bright, sparkling eyes that I had never seen before.
1000621200.korean: - 처음 보는 초롱초롱한 눈으로 게임 서버 복구와 정보 교환을 위한 커뮤니티 개발 작업에 대한 제안서를 내밀던 유미의 모습이 기억난다.

1000621201.english: Sigh... Then I'm going to hurry up and finish this and go do it, okay?
1000621201.korean: 에휴... 그러면 얼른 끝내고 하러 가는 거거든?

1000621202.english: My sister will pass on the work I did on my day off to the commander.
1000621202.korean: 비번일 때 일한 건 언니가 사령관에게 전해줄테니까.

1000621205.english: The gremlin that spotted me ran right up to me in an instant.
1000621205.korean: - 나를 발견한 그렘린은 순식간에 바로 앞까지 달려왔다.

1000621207.english: Come to my room and let's play a game together. Okay?
1000621207.korean: 제 방에 가서 같이 게.임. 해요. 네?

1000621208.english: Hehe, it's fine. I'll do it well, very well~
1000621208.korean: 후후, 괜찮아요. 제가 자알, 아주 자알~

1000621209.english: I can tell you everything from one to ten, from A to Z.
1000621209.korean: 하나부터 열까지, A부터 Z까지 알려드릴 수 있어요.

1000621210.english: So hurry up and go! Quickly! Please!

1000621215.english: If I calculate the schedule... Ugh...

1000621216.english: The commander is going to get some rest, you know?

1000621217.english: My older sister will take good care of the site.

1000621218.english: It seems necessary to boost Gremlin's motivation first before handling other tasks.
1000621218.korean: - 다른 일을 처리하기 전에 우선 그렘린의 의욕을 돋구어줄 필요가 있어보인다.

1000621219.english: I left Gremlin and Fortune to wait for a moment and hurried my steps.
1000621219.korean: - 그렘린과 포츈을 잠시 기다리게 해두고 발걸음을 서둘렀다.

1000621220.english: The members I'm trying to call right now are probably doing other work, but it should be fine for a moment.
1000621220.korean: - 지금 부르려는 대원들은 아마 다른 일을 하고 있겠지만 잠깐 정도는 괜찮겠지.

1000621225.english: Tommy Walker receives orders from the highest commanding officer to change duties.
1000621225.korean: 토미 워커, 최고 명령권자에게 업무 변경을 명령받음.

1000621226.english: Starting now, the work in progress has been changed from maintenance of living facilities to the overhaul of the Orca.
1000621226.korean: 현 시간부터 생활 시설 보수에서 오르카 호 오버홀로 진행 작업을 변경.

1000621229.english: Ah, no matter how tempting that rugged body and weathering are...!
1000621229.korean: 아, 아무리 저 투박한 몸체와 웨더링이 절 유혹한다고 해도...!

1000621233.english: This unit is specialized for assassination. The estimated efficiency when deployed for the requested mission is approximately 37%-
1000621233.korean: 본 기체는 암살에 특화되어 있습니다. 요청하신 업무에 투입될 경우의 예상 효율은 37%정도로-

1000621234.english: Ahaha, Tommy! Bring me those materials over there!
1000621234.korean: 아하핫, 토미! 저기 자재들 좀 가져다 줘!

1000621235.english: Shade, come over here and hold this panel for me!
1000621235.korean: 쉐이드는 이리 와서 이 패널 좀 들어주고!

1000621236.english: Confirmation of temporary transfer of command authority.

1000621240.english: - Shade clearly doesn't have an emotion module, so why does it seem like he's sighing...
1000621240.korean: - 쉐이드에겐 분명 감정 모듈이 없을 텐데 한숨을 쉬는 것 같아 보이는 건 왜일까...

1000621243.english: I remembered it because it was on the list of previous material search reports, so that’s good.
1000621243.korean: - 이전 물자 탐색 보고서 목록에 있길래 기억해뒀었는데 잘됐군.

1000621244.english: The gremlin pressed its body close, its eyes shining.
1000621244.korean: - 그렘린은 눈을 빛내며 바싹 몸을 붙여왔다.

1000621245.english: Uh, uh, I really want that...

1000621246.english: No matter the price... you mean?

1000621247.english: The gremlin, which had been wearing a sly expression, lost its way as I moved even closer.
1000621247.korean: - 능글능글한 표정을 짓고 있던 그렘린의 눈은 내가 더욱 바싹 다가서자 갈 곳을 잃었다.

1000621248.english: Uh, um... well... I, I did say that...
1000621248.korean: 어, 저기... 그게요... 마, 말은 그렇게 했는데...

1000621250.english: As I grabbed her hand, the Gremlin's shoulder twitched.
1000621250.korean: - 손을 붙잡자 그렘린의 어깨가 움찔 떨렸다.

1000621251.english: It's, it's not that I don't want to... Aah... I think I should keep things like that in my room, not here-
1000621251.korean: 시, 싫은 건 아닌데... 아앙... 아무래도 그런 건 여기 말고 제 방-

1000621253.english: - Gremlin stared blankly down at the screwdriver in ger hand.
1000621253.korean: - 그렘린은 자기 손에 들려진 드라이버를 멍하니 내려다보았다.

1000621256.english: "Is this a gain...?" the Gremlin muttered in confusion, then disappeared to do her work.
1000621256.korean: - 이득인건가...? 하고 혼란스럽게 중얼거린 그렘린은 일을 하러 사라졌다.

1000621257.english: Hehe, you solved that neatly, didn't you?

1000621258.english: Since we are not repairing visible damage but rather searching for potential hidden issues, it will take some time, but...
1000621258.korean: - 눈에 띄는 파손을 수리하는 게 아닌 어디 있을지 모를 문제를 찾는 작업이니 시간은 좀 걸리겠지만...

1000621259.english: I'll take care of the rest now.

1000621262.english: I left the hangar behind and went outside.

1000621263.english: In addition to the personnel tasked with establishing a full-scale base at the port, the combat troops were divided into groups; some were assigned to rest, while others were tasked with securing the island.
1000621263.korean: - 항구에 본격적으로 주둔하기 위한 작업 인원들 외에, 전투 인원들은 조를 나눠 일부는 휴식, 일부는 섬의 확보를 부탁해놓았다.

1000621264.english: For now, the units off duty were the Armored Maidens, and parts of the Horizon and Sky Knights.
1000621264.korean: - 일단 지금 비번인 부대가 아머드 메이든, 그리고 호라이즌과 스카이 나이츠 일부였었지.

1000621266.english: Yeah. There's a nice beach on the east side.

1000621267.english: - Harpeia is wearing a swimsuit, but judging by the fact that she’s holding books in both arms, she seems intent on reading.
1000621267.korean: - 하르페이아는 일단 수영복을 입고 있긴 하지만 양 팔 가득 책을 들고 있는 걸로 봐서는 독서에 열중할 생각인 것 같다.

1000621268.english: Ah, um... if nothing comes up, would you like the Commander to come along?
1000621268.korean: 아, 저기... 별 일 없으면 사령관도 같이 갈래?

1000621269.english: I've pretty much finished checking things... and once that's all wrapped up, I guess I should get some rest too.
1000621269.korean: - 확인할 일도 대충 끝났고... 대충 마무리되면 나도 좀 쉬는게 좋겠지.

1000621270.english: - And if possible, you should rest in a visible place so that you don't hear the team members worrying about you getting some rest.
1000621270.korean: - 그리고 가급적 눈에 보이는 곳에서 쉬어야 대원들에게 좀 쉬시라는 걱정 하는 말을 안 들을테니까.

1000621272.english: Hehe, then I'll go ahead and wait for you.
1000621272.korean: 헤헷, 그럼 먼저 가서 기다리고 있을게.

1000621274.english: Not long ago, we had secured the island to some extent in order to wait for the invincible Dragon Fleet, but due to time constraints, we only bombarded it and were unable to deploy personnel to clear every nook and cranny.
1000621274.korean: - 얼마 전, 무적의 용의 함대를 기다리기 위해 어느정도 섬의 확보를 진행했었지만 시간 문제로 포격을 가했을 뿐 인원을 투입해 구석구석 소탕하지는 못했었다.

1000621275.english: Because of that, there are still remnants of Iron Bug forces and unidentified zones remaining on the island. I remembered that the beach Harpyia was heading to was one of them.
1000621275.korean: - 그때문에 섬에는 아직 잔존 철충 세력과 미확인 구역이 남아있다. 하르페이아가 가려는 해변도 그 중 하나였던 게 기억났다.

1000621276.english: It's okay. I was actually planning to tidy up while I was on my way to rest.
1000621276.korean: 괜찮아. 안그래도 쉬러 가는 김에 깨끗하게 정리하려는 참이었어.

1000621277.english: Looking at the reconnaissance intelligence, it wasn't much. Plus, the Steel Line and Valhalla units have been deployed to secure the surrounding area.
1000621277.korean: 정찰 정보를 보니까 얼마 되지도 않더라구. 거기에 그 주변은 스틸라인이랑 발할라 부대가 투입되서 확보중이니까.

1000621278.english: Uh, really...? Ah, you didn't have to...

1000621280.english: Ah, okay. I'll be on standby in the air until the commander is ready.
1000621280.korean: 아, 알았어. 사령관이 준비될 때까지 상공에서 대기하고 있을게.

1000621281.english: - Harpeia, her face flushed bright red, vanished into the sky in an instant.
1000621281.korean: - 얼굴을 새빨갛게 물들인 하르페이아가 순식간에 하늘로 사라졌다.

1000621282.english: At that speed, they'll arrive in no time... I guess I should hurry too.
1000621282.korean: - 저정도 속도면 순식간에 도착하겠지... 나도 서둘러야겠군.

1000621285.english: I've never played games or anything like that...
1000621285.korean: 난 게임 같은 거 안 해봐서...

1000621287.english: Don't worry, I just came for a moment.

1000621289.english: Thanks to you, Gremlin will be at 300% power.
1000621289.korean: 네 덕분에 그렘린은 300%의 힘을 낼 거야.

1000621290.english: Yeah, that's the Steel Line Online Edition too.

1000621292.english: Can you help me with Fortune?

1000621293.english: I'll send the kit to your room.

1000621295.english: Okay, please take care of it. And make sure to let me rest when you're done.
1000621295.korean: 응, 잘 부탁해. 마무리되면 꼭 쉬게 해주고.

1000621296.english: Hi. Are you going to rest?

1000621298.english: I'll go once I finish what I'm doing now.

1000621300.english: That beach, isn't it still not fully secured?
1000621300.korean: 그쪽 해변, 아직 확보가 덜 끝나지 않았어?

1000621301.english: Then I will give you instructions.

1000621302.english: It's not that busy, and the battles in Harpyia are fun to watch.
1000621302.korean: 크게 바쁘지도 않고, 하르페이아의 전투는 보는 맛이 있으니까.

1000621304.english: I think I bought a top-mounted upgrade kit before...
1000621304.korean: 전에 탑돌이 업그레이드 키트를 하나 구했지 아마...

1000621305.english: Let's do it once we're done with work.

1000621309.english: Then, until the commander arrives... um...

1000621311.english: Kyaaa...! It's so erotic right from the first page...

1000621312.english: Okay, wait, I need to calm down a bit... huh?
1000621312.korean: 자, 잠깐 마음을 좀 가라앉혀야... 어?

1000621313.english: That's... Elven and Dark Elven... and Lumberjane?

1000621315.english: It’s not like we’re going to wipe out the whole forest, and we’re just cutting down a mere few trees, so what’s so wrong with that? There are so many trees here.
1000621315.korean: 숲을 싹 밀어버리겠다는 것도 아니고, 꼴랑 몇 그루 벤다는데 뭐가 그렇게 못마땅해? 나무가 이렇게 많은데.

1000621316.english: Besides, these things don't even have an owner now, do they?

1000621317.english: Why would you say there is no owner? The commander is the owner.
1000621317.korean: 주인이 없기는 왜 없어? 사령관이 주인이지.

1000621318.english: That's right. Everything left in this world belongs to the Commander.
1000621318.korean: 맞아. 이 세상에 남은 건 전부 사령관 거야.

1000621322.english: Anyway! I won't tolerate you cutting down trees as you please.
1000621322.korean: 어쨌든! 맘대로 나무를 베어가는 건 용납 못해.

1000621323.english: Yeah, yeah. If you don't want to get hit by a water cannon and turn into a star in the sky, go get a letter of authorization from the commander or something.
1000621323.korean: 그래그래. 물대포 맞고 저 하늘의 별이 되기 싫으면 가서 사령관한테 허가장이라도 받아 오시던가~

1000621327.english: Limited logging for furniture crafting purposes is permitted to ensure the comfortable rest of Orca members.
1000621327.korean: 오르카 대원의 편안한 휴식을 위해, 가구 제작 목적의 제한적인 벌목을 허가함.

1000621328.english: I knew you would react like that, so I brought it in advance. Do you have anything else to say?
1000621328.korean: 그렇게 나오실 줄 알고 미리 받아왔지. 더 할 말 있어?

1000621330.english: What on earth is the commander thinking?!
1000621330.korean: 사령관은 대체 무슨 생각을 하는 거야?!

1000621331.english: The signature is proper... Dark Elven, this isn't going to work.
1000621331.korean: 서명도 제대로 되어있고... 다크엘븐, 이건 안되겠는데?

1000621332.english: How can you back out like that, saying protecting it isn't your job!
1000621332.korean: 지키는 건 네 일 아니라고 그렇게 발 빼면 어떡해!

1000621333.english: Anyway, there aren't any people damaging the environment anymore, so what does it matter? The documents are right there.
1000621333.korean: 어차피 이제 환경을 훼손하는 인간들도 없는데 뭐 어때~ 떡하니 서류도 있고.

1000621335.english: Oh, come on. If it bothers you that much, I'll plant twice as many of the ones he pulled up right nearby. Is that okay?
1000621335.korean: 아 진짜. 정 그렇게 신경쓰이면 쟤가 벤 거 두배를 근처에 심을게. 됐지?

1000621337.english: What? We actually understand each other better than I thought.

1000621338.english: The commander has permission, so what's the point of saying more?
1000621338.korean: 사령관 허락도 있는데 더 말해봐야 뭐하겠어?

1000621339.english: However, if you misinterpret the "limited" part and slash indiscriminately, that thing the Dark Elven is carrying around...
1000621339.korean: 그래도 제한적인이라는 부분을 맘대로 해석해서 마구잡이로 베었다간 다크엘븐이 데리고 다니는 저...

1000621340.english: What was its name again... well, anyway, that bird is going to make a hole in your head.
1000621340.korean: 쟤 이름이 뭐더라... 뭐 하여튼, 저 새가 네 머리에 구멍을 만들어 줄 거야.
