1000621341.english: Ha, do you think we used to cut down trees because we liked it? We just did it because we were told to.
1000621341.korean: 하, 우리가 뭐 예전엔 좋아서 나무를 벤 줄 알아? 시키니까 한 거지.

1000621342.english: I'll only cut exactly what's necessary, so don't worry about it and just do your business.
1000621342.korean: 딱 필요한 만큼만 벨 테니까 신경쓰지 말고 볼 일이나 보라고.

1000621344.english: If it's like this now, how did our models live with all that stress back then?
1000621344.korean: 지금도 이런데, 예전에 우리 모델들은 스트레스 받아서 어떻게 산 거야?

1000621345.english: You must have been bickering with kids like that all the time.
1000621345.korean: 맨날 저런 애들이랑 옥신각신했을 거 아냐.

1000621346.english: ...This won't do. I'm going to go protest to the commander.

1000621347.english: I know you want to see the commander, but wait a moment.
1000621347.korean: 사령관 보고 싶은 건 알겠는데, 잠깐만 기다려봐.

1000621349.english: In the past, an order would have been issued to block it unconditionally, regardless of permits or anything else, right?
1000621349.korean: 예전 같았으면 허가서고 자시고 무조건 막으라는 명령이 내려왔겠지?

1000621351.english: On top of that, you must have received orders to shoot without looking back, right?
1000621351.korean: 거기다 앞 뒤 봐주지 말고 쏘라는 명령도 받았겠지?

1000621354.english: Huh? Hey, where are you going!

1000621356.english: Now of all times? You just gave permission!

1000621357.english: Come to think of it, I got angry...

1000621358.english: Ah, but using my equipment would be a bit awkward.
1000621358.korean: 아, 그래도 내 장비를 쓰는 건 좀 그렇겠다.

1000621359.english: Of course! If you get hurt doing that, you'll get severely scolded by the commander.
1000621359.korean: 당연하지! 그러다 다치기라도 했다간 사령관한테 엄청 혼날거야.

1000621360.english: But I can't use your shotgun either...
1000621360.korean: 그렇다고 네 샷건을 쓸 수도 없고...

1000621362.english: The point is, you just have to do it enough not to get hurt, right?
1000621362.korean: 요는 안 다칠정도로만 하면 되는 거잖아?

1000621364.english: What are they trying to do? I need to read, but I keep finding myself looking around.
1000621364.korean: 뭘 하려는 걸까? 책 읽어야 하는데 계속 구경하게 되네~

1000621367.english: Now, if you just find a suitable palm leaf and stick it in, it will be perfect.
1000621367.korean: 이제 적당한 야자수잎 하나만 구해서 꽂으면 완벽해.

1000621369.english: Oh, right. Do you want to try it too?

1000621370.english: I made it big because the wood is huge. Let's see...
1000621370.korean: 나무가 엄청 굵어서 크게 만들었으니까. 어디 보자...

1000621371.english: It looks like about four people could easily lie down in there.
1000621371.korean: 네 명 정도는 충분히 누울 수 있겠는데?

1000621373.english: What's wrong? Your face is bright red.

1000621376.english: ...Um, there's a suitable spot over there. Why don't you rest there? I'll help you move it.

1000621377.english: Why are you talking like that?

1000621378.english: Well, I'd be thankful if you helped. I'll carry this side. You carry that side.
1000621378.korean: 뭐, 나야 도와준다면 땡큐지. 내가 이쪽 들게. 넌 그쪽 들어.

1000621382.english: Whew, this place is really nice!

1000621383.english: Thanks. I'll give you a can of beer as a thank you.
1000621383.korean: 고마워. 보답으로 맥주 한 캔 줄게.

1000621386.english: Uh, Elven... maybe I should think about it again for a moment...

1000621390.english: Here, you sit down and have a drink too.
1000621390.korean: 자, 너도 앉아서 한 잔 해.

1000621391.english: I brought a cooler full of it, so drink as much as you want.
1000621391.korean: 아이스 박스에 가득 담아왔으니까 얼마든지 마시라고.

1000621393.english: I, I have a low tolerance for alcohol...

1000621394.english: It's okay. I'm weak too, I'm just pretending.
1000621394.korean: 괜찮아. 나도 약한데 그냥 기분만 내는 거야.

1000621395.english: Come to think of it, you're the type who does physical work, too, aren't you? After a hard day's work, having a cold can of beer... Ah.
1000621395.korean: 그리고보니 너도 몸 쓰는 타입이잖아? 힘들게 일하고 시원한 맥주 한 캔 마시면... 크.

1000621396.english: Well, I get drunk and pass out right away after drinking just one can, though.
1000621396.korean: 뭐, 나는 한 캔 먹으면 바로 취해서 쓰러지지만.

1000621397.english: But are you really not drinking? Then give it back. I drank it all by myself- Whoa?!
1000621397.korean: 근데 너 진짜 안마셔? 그럼 돌려줘. 나 혼자 마신- 우왓?!

1000621398.english: Ow, that's cold! What is this splash of water!

1000621399.english: Ahahaha! This is the lot of the Elven who suffered under your predecessor model!
1000621399.korean: 아하하하! 네 선대 모델에게 고통받은 엘븐들의 몫이다!

1000621400.english: Dark Elven! Run away on your own!

1000621402.english: Hey, here I go! Thanks for the beer!
1000621402.korean: 여, 여기, 수건 두고 갈게! 맥주 고마워!

1000621404.english: And in the midst of all that, they even leave a towel... Are they giving me a disease and then offering a cure? What is this?
1000621404.korean: 그와중에 또 수건은 주고 가네... 병 주고 약 주는 거야, 뭐야.

1000621405.english: Do I not have to chase after you?

1000621406.english: Huh? Never mind. It's a hassle.

1000621408.english: By the way, did you come out to rest too? Want to grab a beer?
1000621408.korean: 그런데 너도 쉬러 나왔어? 맥주 한 잔 할래?

1000621410.english: Can I sit next to you?

1000621411.english: Uh. Just sit somewhere that isn't wet.
1000621411.korean: 엉. 거기 안 젖은데에 대충 앉아.

1000621417.english: What, is this your first time trying it?

1000621418.english: Yeah. I was curious, but I never actually had a chance to try it.
1000621418.korean: 응. 호기심은 있었는데 막상 마셔볼 기회가 없었어.

1000621419.english: I've been living my life in vain~ This is so good.

1000621420.english: Hey, drink slowly. If you underestimate this just because it's beer, you'll be dead in no time.
1000621420.korean: 어, 천천히 마셔. 맥주라고 얕봤다간 금세 골로간다.

1000621422.english: You're drinking really slowly too, aren't you?

1000621423.english: I have a low tolerance for alcohol.

1000621424.english: You're eating it because it's delicious, so you shouldn't get drunk and collapse.
1000621424.korean: 맛있어서 먹는 건데 취해서 쓰러져버리면 안 되잖-

1000621425.english: Burr, did you already finish a can?
1000621425.korean: 버, 벌써 한 캔 다 마셨어?

1000621426.english: Hmm, it seems to suit my taste better than I thought.
1000621426.korean: 음, 생각보다 입맛에 맞는 것 같아.

1000621427.english: I'm sorry, but... can you give me one more?
1000621427.korean: 미안한데... 하나 더 줄 수 있어?

1000621428.english: Uh, uh... there are plenty, so that doesn't matter...

1000621433.english: I wonder how long it has been since I spent time this quietly...

1000621437.english: I'd like to sit next to you.

1000621439.english: It's quiet and nice. Did the owner tell you about this place?

1000621441.english: Life on the submarine must have been very painful for you, right?

1000621442.english: The driving sounds we cannot hear, the sound of water, the smell...
1000621442.korean: 우리는 못 듣는 구동음에, 물소리, 냄새...

1000621443.english: Since even we can feel how much you are struggling, the Master must have naturally known.
1000621443.korean: 당신이 힘들어하는 걸 저희도 느낄 정도니까 주인님께선 당연히 알고 계셨겠죠.

1000621444.english: ...My master told me not to worry about the escort for the time being and to get some good rest, and showed me this place.
1000621444.korean: ...주인님께선 당분간 호위는 신경쓰지 말고 푹 쉬라고 하시면서 이곳을 알려주셨습니다.

1000621445.english: It certainly has a tranquil atmosphere, which is something you would like.

1000621447.english: Everyone else is busy, so it feels a bit... like I'm the only one resting.
1000621447.korean: 다른 분들은 다들 바쁘신데, 저만 쉬는 것 같아 조금...

1000621448.english: Don't worry about it, as most combat units are resting anyway, except for Steel Line and Valhalla.
1000621448.korean: 어차피 전투부대는 스틸라인과 발할라를 제외하곤 대부분 쉬고 있으니 신경쓰지 마세요.

1000621449.english: We are busy; it is only natural since we are helping with your work, Master.
1000621449.korean: 저희가 바쁜 거야, 주인님의 업무를 돕는 입장이니 당연-

1000621451.english: One of those resting combat units will come over here to hang out.
1000621451.korean: 그 쉬는 전투 부대 중 하나가 이쪽으로 놀러 올겁니다.

1000621452.english: Can't you hear it starting to come?

1000621454.english: So you are the Horizon... people.

1000621455.english: It sounds like you are really enjoying yourself just by listening to it.
1000621455.korean: 듣기만 해도 정말 즐거우신 것 같습니다.

1000621456.english: Things are going to get really busy once the fleet commander returns. So this is my last vacation.
1000621456.korean: 함대장님이 돌아오시면 본격적으로 바빠질테니까요. 마지막 휴가라는거죠.

1000621457.english: Well, anyway. Are you going to keep staying here? Horizon is a unit second to none when it comes to being noisy.
1000621457.korean: 뭐, 어쨌든. 계속 여기 있을건가요? 호라이즌은 시끄럽기로는 둘째가라면 서러운 부대인데.

1000621461.english: I happen to have something to do.

1000621462.english: It is said that this island held a very important military position even before its demise.
1000621462.korean: 이 섬은 멸망 전에도 군사적으로 굉장히 중요한 위치였다고 합니다.

1000621463.english: So, several military bases were established.
1000621463.korean: 그래서 군사 기지가 몇 개씩이나 들어섰었죠.

1000621465.english: That's right. For now, since the Steel Line will be exploring the area they've secured, there won't be that many Iron Bugs, and above all...
1000621465.korean: 맞아요. 일단 스틸라인 분들이 확보한 지역을 탐색할 테니까 철충도 그리 많진 않을 거고, 무엇보다...

1000621468.english: ...And don't I have to produce some results so that I can stay by my master's side for at least a little longer later?
1000621468.korean: ...그리고 뭔가 성과를 내야 나중에 주인님 곁에 조금이라도 오래 붙어있을 것 아닙니까.

1000621469.english: Even though the Master is a bit unreliable, he is reliable in that regard, so if you produce results, he will make time for you even if he has to go out of his way.
1000621469.korean: 주인님께서는 조금 못미덥긴 해도 그런 쪽에서는 확실하시니 성과를 내면 일부러라도 시간을 내주실 겁니다.

1000621470.english: Is that... your sister's personal experience...?

1000621473.english: ...I only did it because I happened to think of your face when you were escorting the Master.
1000621473.korean: ...우연히 주인님을 호위할때의 당신 얼굴이 생각나서 그랬을 뿐입니다.

1000621474.english: Because the person who usually looked so frail, as if they might collapse at any moment, was smiling comfortably next to Master.
1000621474.korean: 평소엔 당장이라도 쓰러질 것처럼 위태로워 보이던 사람이 주인님 옆에선 편안하게 웃고 있었으니까요.

1000621476.english: Because by my master's side... I can forget everything else...
1000621476.korean: 주인님 곁에서는... 다른 것들은 전부 잊을 수 있기에...

1000621477.english: Why don't you confess that directly to your master?

1000621479.english: ...Well, I won't go out of my way to take care of that.

1000621480.english: Now I can even hear the voices of Miss Thetis and Miss Nereid.
1000621480.korean: 이젠 저한테까지 테티스 양과 네레이드 양의 목소리가 들리는군요.

1000621481.english: Let's get moving. It's not that far.

1000621484.english: ...Yes. Since I like being in nature...

1000621485.english: I especially like deep forests like this.
1000621485.korean: 이렇게 깊은 숲은 특히 더 좋아합니다.

1000621486.english: Hmm... but even considering the passage of time, the forest does seem excessively overgrown.
1000621486.korean: 흠... 그런데 시간이 흐른 걸 감안해도 지나치게 숲이 무성한 것 같긴 하군요.

1000621490.english: It is not a living creature, but it is not an Iron Bug either.

1000621491.english: Then is it an AGS? Well, it wouldn't be strange to have some security AGSs left.
1000621491.korean: 그럼 AGS인가요. 뭐, 경비 AGS가 좀 남아있는 것도 이상하진 않겠죠.

1000621492.english: ...It seems a little different from that as well. Something I have never felt before...
1000621492.korean: ...그것과도 조금 다른 것 같습니다. 한 번도 느껴본적 없는...

1000621494.english: Cute ladies! How is the plan going?
1000621494.korean: 귀여운 숙녀분들! 계획은 잘 되어 가십니까!

1000621498.english: Oh dear, excuse me. I see you are the newcomers to this island who arrived recently.
1000621498.korean: 어이쿠, 이거 실례했습니다. 얼마 전에 이 섬에 새로 오신분들이시군요.

1000621502.english: Uh, sis... who on earth is that person...

1000621503.english: It is so excessively suspicious that it actually looks normal.

1000621505.english: It doesn't matter whether you went or came. What matters is that you discovered a suspicious entity.
1000621505.korean: 갔든 왔든 중요하지 않습니다. 수상한 개체를 발견했다는 것이 중요하죠.

1000621506.english: Let's pursue them. I will report while on the move.

1000621507.english: That suspicious robot is heading towards an unsecured zone, but you are ready for combat, right?
1000621507.korean: 저 수상한 로봇이 향한 방향은 미확보 구역인데, 전투 준비는 되어있죠?

1000621509.english: - Following the squad members who were sortieing on another mission, I arrived near the beach where I had promised Harpyia.
1000621509.korean: - 다른 임무로 출격하는 대원들을 따라 하르페이아와 약속한 해변 근처에 도착했다.

1000621510.english: Harpyia, who came out to greet them, was with an unexpected person.
1000621510.korean: - 마중을 나온 하르페이아는 의외의 인물과 함께 있었다.

1000621512.english: A strong smell of alcohol wafted from the staggering Lumberjane.

1000621514.english: Uh, how can you drink six cans of beer and still be fine...?
1000621514.korean: 어, 어떻게 맥주를 여섯 캔이나 마시고 멀쩡할 수 있는 거야...?

1000621515.english: Hehe, it was my first time trying it, and it was surprisingly delicious.

1000621516.english: Miss Lumberjane here drank half a can and passed out, but...
1000621516.korean: 여기 럼버제인 양은 반 캔 마시고 기절해버렸지만...

1000621517.english: On days when I can handle it well, I can last up to one can, but today...
1000621517.korean: 잘 받는 날엔 한 캔까지는 버틸 수 있는데 오늘은...

1000621519.english: Wait a minute. What was something good for a hangover again...

1000621520.english: Ah! I think the tomato juice was good? And also...
1000621520.korean: 아! 토마토 주스가 좋았던 것 같은데? 그리고 또...

1000621521.english: Talking like a tomato. Forget it.

1000621522.english: Commander, I heard you were going for a walk with this kid? I want to go too.
1000621522.korean: 사령관, 얘랑 같이 산책하기로 했다며? 나도 같이 갈래.

1000621523.english: - I made eye contact with Harpeia, who was holding her index finger to her lips and muttering, “Hangover, hangover...”
1000621523.korean: - 입술에 검지 손가락을 대고 숙취, 숙취... 하고 중얼거리던 하르페이아와 눈이 마주쳤다.

1000621524.english: - After Harpeia gave me a sly smile and mouthed that it was okay, I nodded.
1000621524.korean: - 하르페이아에게 눈웃음과 함께 입모양으로 괜찮다는 대답을 듣고 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000621526.english: After discussing for a moment where to go, we followed Lumberjane's suggestion and entered the forest attached to the beach.
1000621526.korean: - 어디로 갈 지 잠시 상의하다 럼버제인의 의견을 따라 해변에 붙어있는 숲 속으로 들어왔다.

1000621528.english: - I heard a little while ago that Elven had played a trick on her, so I asked her about it, but Lumberjane shook her head.
1000621528.korean: - 조금전에 엘븐에게 골탕먹었다는 이야기를 듣고 물어보았지만 럼버제인은 고개를 저었다.

1000621529.english: What? It's not like I poured boiling oil or anything, just water.
1000621529.korean: 아니? 끓는 기름을 부은 것도 아니고 물 가지고 뭘.

1000621530.english: We have plenty of alcohol, so wouldn't it be great to all hang out together?

1000621535.english: - Lumberjane froze when she glanced over her shoulder.

1000621538.english: - A large beetle is perched on Lumberjane’s shoulder as she screams in terror.
1000621538.korean: - 기겁해 비명을 지르는 럼버제인의 어깨 위에 커다란 풍뎅이가 앉아 있다.

1000621539.english: - Lumberjane couldn't even think of pulling it off; she just wrapped her arms around her head and slumped down.
1000621539.korean: - 럼버제인은 떼어낼 생각도 하지 못하고 머리를 감싸고 주저앉았다.

1000621541.english: - I brushed the beetle off Lumberjane’s trembling shoulder.
1000621541.korean: - 벌벌 떠는 럼버제인의 어깨에서 풍뎅이를 떼어냈다.

1000621542.english: - The horns, which are about half the length of an adult male's forearm, catch the eye, and the shell is glossy.
1000621542.korean: - 성인 남성 팔뚝의 절반만한 길이의 뿔이 시선을 사로잡고, 껍데기엔 광택이 흐른다.

1000621543.english: Did you... did you take it off?

1000621544.english: - As the heavy weight on her shoulders lifted, Lumberjane squinted and asked.
1000621544.korean: - 어깨 위의 묵직한 무게감이 사라지자 럼버제인은 실눈을 뜨며 물었다.

1000621545.english: Wow, this is a Hercules beetle.

1000621546.english: It's the first time I've actually seen this. It's fascinating.

1000621547.english: By the way, do they live over here too...?

1000621548.english: Hey, hurry up and get that out of the way!

1000621554.english: I almost stepped on a caterpillar.

1000621560.english: Wow, this is a Hercules beetle.

1000621561.english: I read that even though it's usually big, it doesn't grow this big...
1000621561.korean: 원래 크긴해도 이정도까지 자라지는 않는다고 읽었었는데...

1000621562.english: It's the first time I've seen this in real life. It's fascinating...

1000621563.english: Hey, hurry up and get that out of the way!

1000621564.english: Harpyia paid no heed to us trembling and examined the insect with eyes full of curiosity.
1000621564.korean: - 하르페이아는 벌벌 떠는 우리를 아랑곳하지 않고 호기심 가득한 눈으로 벌레를 살펴보았다.

1000621565.english: Wait a minute. Since I can't see this anytime, I want to take a closer look.
1000621565.korean: 잠깐만. 아무때나 볼 수 있는 게 아니니까 조금만 더 살펴보고 싶어.

1000621570.english: I almost stepped on a caterpillar.

1000621573.english: Hmm... I'm not sure what this is...

1000621574.english: I'll have to look it up later... huh?

1000621577.english: Did you get bitten by a bug? I've never heard of a bug with venom strong enough to affect a bioroid...
1000621577.korean: 벌레에 물리신 건가요? 바이오로이드에게 통할 정도로 강한 독을 가진 벌레는 들어보지 못했는데...

1000621578.english: H-could it be a biological weapon resulting from some experiment...?
1000621578.korean: 호, 혹시 어떤 실험의 결과물인 생체병기가 아닐까요...?

1000621581.english: ...Bye, I'll let you rest in bed for a while.

1000621582.english: - Daphne disappeared with Lumberjane, a look of confusion on her face.
1000621582.korean: - 다프네는 복잡한 얼굴로 럼버제인을 데리고 사라졌다.

1000621583.english: Ahaha... That's unexpected. I thought you wouldn't be afraid of things like bugs at all, but to think you'd faint...
1000621583.korean: 아하하... 의외네. 벌레 같은 건 하나도 안무서워할 줄 알았는데 기절할 정도라니...

1000621584.english: Harpyia, who had been crouching down to nurse Lumberjane, quietly looked up at me.
1000621584.korean: - 럼버제인을 간호하느라 쪼그려 앉아있던 하르페이아는 가만히 나를 올려다보았다.

1000621585.english: Hey. Is the promise to go for a walk together from earlier still valid?
1000621585.korean: 있잖아. 아까 같이 산책한다는 약속 아직 유효해?

1000621587.english: Harpyia smiled faintly and carefully took my hand.
1000621587.korean: - 하르페이아는 작게 웃어보이곤 조심스레 내 손을 잡았다.

1000621592.english: I was wondering if I had gone too far...

1000621593.english: So I waited for you to put on your swimsuit, didn't I?

1000621594.english: also did it before opening because I was worried about wasting the beer.
1000621594.korean: 맥주 버릴까봐 따기 전에 하기도 했고.

1000621597.english: That's because you ordered me to do it suddenly!

1000621598.english: Anyway. Let's apologize properly later. It's too...
1000621598.korean: 어쨌든. 나중에 가서 제대로 사과하자. 너무...

1000621599.english: Okay, okay. I'll definitely apologize later. Honestly...
1000621599.korean: 알았어, 알았어. 나중에 꼭 사과할게. 솔직히...

1000621600.english: After talking about it myself, I also wondered why the senior models fought so much.
1000621600.korean: 나도 이야기해보니까 선배 모델들은 왜 그렇게 싸웠나 싶기도 하더라.

1000621601.english: Even though she acts a bit prickly, she seems to have a good personality.
1000621601.korean: 틱틱대긴 해도 성격은 좋은 것 같던데.

1000621602.english: ...because she must have received orders back then.

1000621604.english: Well, for now, let's just take a walk in the forest for the first time in a while.
1000621604.korean: 뭐, 일단 지금은 오랜만에 삼림욕이나 하자.

1000621605.english: Hehehe... I've been waiting for this moment!

1000621606.english: I wanted to wear a proper swimsuit, you know~
1000621606.korean: 이왕이면 제대로 된 수영복을 입고 싶었는데 말야~

1000621607.english: It can't be helped since Audrey is busy.

1000621608.english: That's true. It's a relief that we at least have something like this.
1000621608.korean: 그건 그렇지. 우린 이런 거라도 있어서 다행이야.

1000621609.english: What are you doing? You take yours off quickly too.

1000621610.english: You're not actually feeling shy even when no one is around, are you?
1000621610.korean: 설마 아무도 없는데서까지 부끄러워하는 건 아니지?

1000621612.english: Don't worry, the commander won't come.
1000621612.korean: 사령관이 올 리는 없으니까 걱정하지 말고.

1000621613.english: Now, are you going to keep talking about that person?!

1000621615.english: Hurry up and change your clothes.

1000621619.english: Come to think of it, it's funny.

1000621621.english: We're not exactly fairies, but to think that being in the forest relieves fatigue.
1000621621.korean: 우린 진짜 요정도 아닌데 숲에 들어와 있으면 피로가 풀린다니.

1000621622.english: They say this isn't even a placebo effect; it's actually true. The doctor was talking about hormones and stuff the other day.
1000621622.korean: 심지어 이건 플라시보 효과도 아니고 실제로 그렇대. 저번에 닥터가 호르몬이 어쩌구 하던데.

1000621623.english: When I went to see you because you said you were tired?

1000621624.english: Yeah. I went to see Daphne, and since the doctor happened to be there, I had a few tests done.
1000621624.korean: 응. 다프네한테 갔는데 마침 닥터가 있길래 검사를 좀 해봤거든.

1000621625.english: I don't know what it is, but the graph looked drastically different when I was inside the submarine, outside, and in the forest.
1000621625.korean: 뭔진 몰라도 잠수함 안에 있을 때랑 밖에 있을 때랑 숲 속에 있을 때랑 그래프가 확 다르던데?

1000621627.english: Well, I guess... we were created in the first place, so that kind of manipulation would have been a piece of cake.
1000621627.korean: 하긴 뭐... 애초에 우리는 만들어진건데 그정도 조작 쯤이야 식은 죽 먹기였겠지.

1000621628.english: What's the use of having emotions and a self if you can't move an inch at a single word?
1000621628.korean: 감정이랑 자아가 있으면 뭐해~ 결국 말 한마디에 꼼짝도 못하는데.

1000621629.english: You saw that record there, too, right?

1000621631.english: Those countless records of 'office romances' between our senior models and the people at the company...
1000621631.korean: 우리 선배 모델들이랑 회사의 인간들간의 그 수많은 '사내 연애' 기록들...

1000621632.english: Was that really a real relationship?

1000621634.english: The commander and you too... in the end...

1000621637.english: Anyone can see that you really like the Commander, right?
1000621637.korean: 너는 누가봐도 사령관을 진짜로 좋아하는게 맞지~

1000621638.english: You can't make it that obvious just because someone tells you to, right?
1000621638.korean: 그렇게 티내는 건 누가 시킨다고 되는게 아니잖아?

1000621639.english: Is it... is it that obvious...?

1000621642.english: Wouldn't it be less direct to just go and tell them you like them?
1000621642.korean: 차라리 가서 좋아한다고 말하는 게 덜 직접적인 방식일걸?

1000621646.english: - I briefly forgot, but the direction we initially took was the direction the two Elven went.
1000621646.korean: - 잠시 잊고 말았지만, 처음에 우리가 잡은 방향은 두 엘븐이 간 방향이었다.

1000621647.english: We hid ourselves at the sound of the voices, and unintentionally ended up looking like we were eavesdropping.
1000621647.korean: - 말소리에 우린 몸을 숨겼고, 본의아니게 엿듣는 것처럼 되어버리고 말았다.

1000621648.english: Those two... seeing them settle down, it looks like they're going to talk for quite a while longer.
1000621648.korean: 저 둘... 자리 잡고 앉은걸 보니 한참 더 이야기할 것 같아.

1000621649.english: I think it would be best to leave now... What about the Commander?
1000621649.korean: 지금이라도 나가는게 좋을 것 같은데... 사령관은?

1000621650.english: As I emerged from the bushes where I had been hiding, the gazes of the Elven and Dark Elven, who were in the middle of talking, turned toward me.
1000621650.korean: - 몸을 숨겼던 풀숲에서 나오자 한창 이야기를 나누던 엘븐과 다크엘븐의 시선이 내게 향했다.

1000621653.english: Unlike the Elven who greeted with composure, the Dark Elven looked visibly flustered at a glance.
1000621653.korean: - 여유있게 인사하는 엘븐과 달리 다크엘븐은 한눈에 보기에도 몹시 당황한 것 처럼 보였다.

1000621656.english: Hey. That's how you make it obvious.

1000621658.english: Ah, no... it's not like that...

1000621661.english: Hey, just forgive her quickly. She's begging like that.
1000621661.korean: 야, 얼른 용서해 드려. 저렇게 비시잖아.

1000621663.english: The Dark Elven, who had been momentarily flustered, suddenly glared at me.
1000621663.korean: - 잠시 당황하던 다크엘븐이 갑자기 나를 노려보았다.

1000621664.english: Come to think of it, how could you let someone cut down trees so easily!
1000621664.korean: 그러고보니 당신, 나무 베는 걸 그렇게 쉽게 허락해주면 어떡해!

1000621665.english: Is it because Lumberjane even prepared the documents to build a flat bench?
1000621665.korean: - 럼버제인이 평상 만든다고 서류까지 준비해온 것 때문인가?

1000621667.english: So it was because of you!

1000621668.english: That's right. Commander, seeing us wearing this, doesn't it remind you of anything?
1000621668.korean: 맞다. 사령관, 우리 이거 입은 거 보니까 생각나는 거 없어?

1000621670.english: Coincidentally, the number of people is exactly the same, four.

1000621671.english: How about we try reenacting it...?
